A five-star A380 ultra-luxury airliner was hijacked on its international maiden voyage, and international security expert Gao Haojun stood up to a group of thugs, his daughter Xiaojun was trapped in the cabin, and Mike, the leader of the hijackers, threatened the lives of more than 800 people in the plane as a bargaining chip, and Xiaojun's mother, Fu Yuan, was also in danger. ...... Will the passengers on board be able to land safely and how should this crisis be resolved?

title_khmer: ស្រីធ្មប់បៃតង – Wicked
overview: In the land of Oz, ostracized and misunderstood green-skinned Elphaba is forced to share a room with the popular aristocrat Glinda at Shiz University, and the two’s unlikely friendship is tested as they begin to fulfill their respective destinies as Glinda the Good and the Wicked Witch of the West.
overview_en: In the land of Oz, ostracized and misunderstood green-skinned Elphaba is forced to share a room with the popular aristocrat Glinda at Shiz University, and the two's unlikely friendship is tested as they begin to fulfill their respective destinies as Glinda the Good and the Wicked Witch of the West.

title_khmer: ភឺរឺហ្គ្រីននិងកុមារចម្លែក – Miss Peregrine’s Home for Peculiar Children
title_english: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children
overview: A teenager finds himself transported to an island where he must help protect a group of orphans with special powers from creatures intent on destroying them.
overview_en: A teenager finds himself transported to an island where he must help protect a group of orphans with special powers from creatures intent on destroying them.

title_khmer: ស្តេចតោវគ្គ 2 : អ្នកស្នងតំណែងស៊ីមបា – The Lion King II: Simba’s Pride
title_english: The Lion King II: Simba's Pride
overview: The circle of life continues for Simba, now fully grown and in his rightful place as the king of Pride Rock. Simba and Nala have given birth to a daughter, Kiara who's as rebellious as her father was. But Kiara drives her parents to distraction when she catches the eye of Kovu, the son of the evil lioness, Zira. Will Kovu steal Kiara's heart?
overview_en: The circle of life continues for Simba, now fully grown and in his rightful place as the king of Pride Rock. Simba and Nala have given birth to a daughter, Kiara who's as rebellious as her father was. But Kiara drives her parents to distraction when she catches the eye of Kovu, the son of the evil lioness, Zira. Will Kovu steal Kiara's heart?

title_khmer: ផែនការកម្ទេចសុខនខពិសោធន៍ – Project Silence
overview: Due to sudden deteriorating weather conditions, visibility on the Airport Bridge is severely impaired, leaving people stranded and at risk of the bridge collapsing due to a series of chain collisions and explosions. Amidst the chaos, the canine subjects “Echo” from the military experiment “Project Silence,” who were being transported in secret, break free, and all human survivors become targets of relentless attacks.
overview_en: Due to sudden deteriorating weather conditions, visibility on the Airport Bridge is severely impaired, leaving people stranded and at risk of the bridge collapsing due to a series of chain collisions and explosions. Amidst the chaos, the canine subjects "Echo" from the military experiment "Project Silence," who were being transported in secret, break free, and all human survivors become targets of relentless attacks.

title_khmer: ស្នេហាឆ្លងភព Passengers
overview: វាជាការធ្វើដំណើរទៅកាន់ភពមួយទៀតក្នុងរយៈពេល 120 ឆ្នាំដោយអ្នកដំណើរទាំងអស់ត្រូវគេងក្នុងទូត្រជាក់ក្នុងយានដើម្បីពន្យាអាយុជីវិតដើម្បីធ្វើដំណើរទៅដល់ភពថ្មីនោះ ! តែអកុសលអ្វី ស្រាប់តែមានមនុស្សពីរនាក់បានភ្ញាក់មុនការគ្រោងទុកនៅលើយាននោះធ្វើឲ្យដំណើរឿងដ៏គ្រោះថ្នាក់និង ផ្អែមល្ហែមក៏បានកើតឡើង
overview_en: A spacecraft traveling to a distant colony planet and transporting thousands of people has a malfunction in its sleep chambers. As a result, two passengers are awakened 90 years early.

title_khmer: អ្នកជំនាញបំបែកកូដ Decoded
overview: In the 1940s, the world was in turmoil, and it was crucial to decipher the enemy's communication codes in a timely and accurate manner. Rong Jinzhen has shown amazing mathematical talent since her childhood, and because she solved the problems assigned by her math teacher, she was noticed by more people, and even walked into the door of code-breaking by mistake.
overview_en: In the 1940s, the world was in turmoil, and it was crucial to decipher the enemy's communication codes in a timely and accurate manner. Rong Jinzhen has shown amazing mathematical talent since her childhood, and because she solved the problems assigned by her math teacher, she was noticed by more people, and even walked into the door of code-breaking by mistake.

title_khmer: ភ្លើងស្នេហ៍ខុសជំនាន់ – Ditto
overview: A story about the love and friendship that takes place in an era where a man and a woman communicate through radio by chance.
overview_en: A story about the love and friendship that takes place in an era where a man and a woman communicate through radio by chance.

title_khmer: 7ថ្ងៃនៅតៃប៉ិ – Weekend in Taipei
overview: A former DEA agent and a former undercover operative revisit their romance during a fateful weekend in Taipei, unaware of the dangerous consequences of their past.
overview_en: A former DEA agent and a former undercover operative revisit their romance during a fateful weekend in Taipei, unaware of the dangerous consequences of their past.

title_khmer: ថ្ងៃនោះម្តងទៀត – Rewind
overview: REWIND is a children’s movie about online creators Céline dept and Michiel Callebaut. CEMI is launching their 500th video: a special music video in collaboration with Pat Krimson and Loredana De Amicis. But something goes wrong and Céline accidentally travels back in time to the ‘90’s. It’s up to Michiel to track her down and bring her back in time to launch their video.
overview_en: REWIND is a children’s movie about online creators Céline dept and Michiel Callebaut. CEMI is launching their 500th video: a special music video in collaboration with Pat Krimson and Loredana De Amicis. But something goes wrong and Céline accidentally travels back in time to the ‘90’s. It’s up to Michiel to track her down and bring her back in time to launch their video.

title_khmer: Children of the Sea – KhmerSub
overview: Ruka is a young girl whose parents are separated and whose father works in an aquarium. When two boys, Umi and Sora, who were raised in the sea by dugongs, are brought to the aquarium, Ruka feels drawn to them and begins to realize that she has the same sort of supernatural connection to the ocean that they do. Umi and Sora’s special power seems to be connected to strange events that have been occurring more and more frequently, such as the appearance of sea creatures far from their home territory and the disappearance of aquarium animals around the world. However, the exact nature of the boys’ power and of the abnormal events is unknown, and Ruka gets drawn into investigating the mystery that surrounds her new friends.

title_khmer: ពេជ្ឈឃាដស្រមោលមរណៈ – The Shadow Strays
overview: Skilled in the art of killing, a young assassin defies her mentor to save a boy from a ruthless crime syndicate — and she’ll destroy anyone in her path.
overview_en: Skilled in the art of killing, a young assassin defies her mentor to save a boy from a ruthless crime syndicate — and she'll destroy anyone in her path.

title_khmer: ស្នាមញញឹមមច្ចុរាជ វគ្គ2 – Smile 2
overview: About to embark on a new world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins experiencing increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and the pressures of fame, Skye is forced to face her dark past to regain control of her life before it spirals out of control.
overview_en: About to embark on a new world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins experiencing increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and the pressures of fame, Skye is forced to face her dark past to regain control of her life before it spirals out of control.

title_khmer: ទៅផ្ទះវិញ Home Coming
overview: សមាជិកពីរនាក់នៃក្រសួងការបរទេសចិនមានភារកិច្ចជម្លៀសពលរដ្ឋចិននៅពេលដែលសង្គ្រាមផ្ទុះឡើងនៅ Numia អាហ្វ្រិកខាងជើង
overview_en: Two members of the Chinese Ministry of Foreign Affairs are tasked with the evacuation of Chinese citizens when war breaks out in Numia, North Africa.

title_khmer: បឹងចម្លែក Caddo Lake
overview: មានមនុស្សបាត់ខ្លួនដោយអាថ៍កំបាំងនៅបឹងចម្លែកមួយកន្លែងដែលមានឈ្មោះថា Cado , អ្នកដែលតាមស្វែងរកមនុស្សដែលបាត់ខ្លួនក៏ត្រូវវង្វែងវង្វាន់ភាំងស្មារតីដ៏ចម្លែកពេលទៅដល់បឹងនោះ , តើបឹងនោះមានអាថ៍កំបាំងអ្វី?
overview_en: When an 8-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes on Caddo Lake, a series of past deaths and disappearances begin to link together, forever altering a broken family’s history.

title_khmer: តាមរំដោះតាណូអែល – Red One
overview: ដំណឹងស្វែងរកតាណូអែល , Christmas ឆ្នាំនេះតាណូអែលត្រូវចាប់ខ្លួនដោយអាថ៍កំបាំង , បេសកកម្មតាមរកតាណូអែលក៏ត្រូវបានចាប់ផ្តើម. ..
overview_en: After Santa Claus (codename: Red One) is kidnapped, the North Pole's Head of Security must team up with the world's most infamous tracker in a globe-trotting, action-packed mission to save Christmas.

title_khmer: ទាហានមិនកាន់កាំភ្លើង Hacksaw Ridge
overview: WWII American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, who served during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people and becomes the first Conscientious Objector in American history to receive the Congressional Medal of Honor.
overview_en: WWII American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, who served during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people and becomes the first Conscientious Objector in American history to receive the Congressional Medal of Honor.

title_khmer: ជូកឃឺរ – Joker
overview: ពីមនុស្សធម្មតាម្នាក់ដែលសុំត្រឹមតស៊ូរស់ចិញ្ចឹមម្តាយនៅក្នុងសង្គមមួយដែលគេមិនឲ្យតម្លៃមាក់ងាយធ្វើបាបរើសអើង! បង្ខំគេរហូតឲ្យគេក្លាយជានិមិត្តរូបជនដែលរងអយុតិ្តធម៌ទាំងអស់ គេម្នាក់នោះគឺ ” Joker “
overview_en: During the 1980s, a failed stand-up comedian is driven insane and turns to a life of crime and chaos in Gotham City while becoming an infamous psychopathic crime figure.

title_khmer: កំពូលភ្នាក់ងារចរចា – Crisis Negotiators
overview: ជាភ្នាក់ងារចរចាដែលមានភារកិច្ចសំខាន់បំផុតដើម្បីចរចាដោះស្រាយកុំឲ្យមានបញ្ហាឬសោកនាដកម្មអ្វីកើតឡើង
overview_en: Negotiator expert Cheuk Man Wai unexpectedly becomes the prime suspect in a murder case. Forced into a corner, he occupies the police station, taking officers hostage, and demands negotiations with the former negotiator Tse Ka Chun. With Tse's expertise in psychological manipulation and Check's exceptional skills, they engage in a battle of wits. As the verbal sparring deepens, their positions and mindsets gradually change.

title_khmer: មិត្តសំណព្វចិត្ត – Past Lives
overview: ទំនាក់ទំនងយ៉ាងជ្រាលជ្រៅតាំងពីកុមារភាពដែលគ្មានថ្ងៃភ្លេចស្រាប់តែត្រូវមកប្រឈមនឹងបច្ចុបន្បកាលដ៏ នឹកស្មានមិនដល់ , តើមានអ្វីនៅពិក្រោយទំនាក់ទំនងរបស់ពួកគេ?
overview_en: After decades apart, childhood friends Nora and Hae Sung are reunited in New York for one fateful weekend as they confront notions of destiny, love, and the choices that make a life.

title_khmer: Fate/stay night: Heaven’s Feel III. Spring Song​
title_english: Fate/stay night: Heaven's Feel III. Spring Song
overview: As Sakura drowns in the murky darkness of the sins she has committed, Shirou’s vow to protect her at all costs leads him into a raging battle to put an end to the Holy Grail War. Will Shirou’s wish reach Sakura even as he challenges fate itself in a desperate battle against the rising tide?
overview_en: The battle rages on as Shirou continues to protect Sakura, now consumed by the darkness. He joins forces with Rin to end the Holy Grail War, while Illyasviel, who knows the truth behind it, confronts her fate. Amidst the chaos, Zouken plots to manipulate Sakura for his own desires. The final fight begins.

title_khmer: សង្គ្រាមមនុស្ស AI – The Creator
overview: ភ្នាក់ងារបង្កប់ម្នាក់ ទទួលភារកិច្ចដើម្បីទៅកំទេចអាវុធមួយដែលបង្កើតឡើងដោយមនុស្សបំលែង AI ដែលជាអាវុធមួយអាចបង្កគ្រោះថ្នាក់ដល់មនុស្សជាតិ រួចមកគេក៏បានដឹងពីគោលបំណងនៃការបង្កើតអាវុធនោះ ដែលធ្វើឲ្យគេផ្លាស់ប្ដូរគោលដៅភ្លាមៗ….
overview_en: Amid a future war between the human race and the forces of artificial intelligence, a hardened ex-special forces agent grieving the disappearance of his wife, is recruited to hunt down and kill the Creator, the elusive architect of advanced AI who has developed a mysterious weapon with the power to end the war—and mankind itself.

title_khmer: វីណម : ដង្ហើមចុងក្រោយ – Venom: The Last Dance
overview: ដង្ហើមចុងក្រោយដែលបន្សល់នៅភាពសោកសៅ ដង្ហើមចុងក្រោយនៃទំនាក់ទំនងរបស់គេទាំងពីរមានតែសេចក្តីស្លាប់ទេទើបអាចបំបែកពួកគេបាន
overview_en: Eddie and Venom are on the run. Hunted by both of their worlds and with the net closing in, the duo are forced into a devastating decision that will bring the curtains down on Venom and Eddie's last dance.

title_khmer: ថាមពលមនុស្សចម្លែក – Inuyashiki
overview: ពិភពលោកទាំងមូលនឹងត្រូវវិនាសព្រោះតែសោកនាដកម្មដ៏នឹកស្មានមិនដល់ព្រោះតែថាមពលដ៏ចម្លែកមួយ , លោកតាម្នាក់ស្រាប់តែលេចមុខក្នុងនាមជា​ វីរបុរស​ដែលមិនដែលធ្លាប់ឃេីញពីមុន​ .
overview_en: A middle-aged office worker encounters aliens and is gifted with alien technology and limitless powers.

title_khmer: មនុស្សយន្តព្រៃ The Wild Robot
overview: ” មនុស្សយន្តព្រៃ ” វាមិនត្រឹមតែជាភាពយន្ត គំនូជីវចលល្អមើលកម្សាន្តអារម្មណ៍ធម្មតានោះទេ វាបានឆ្លុះបង្ហាញពីភាពម្ចាស់ការនឹងលះបង់ដើម្បីបំពេញភារកិច្ចជាម្តាយ និង ការទទួលខុសត្រូវយ៉ាងខ្ពង់ខ្ពស់ទោះ ខ្លួនជា Robot ដែលគេចងដោយកូដក៏ដោយក៏សុខចិត្តល្មើសនឹងបញ្ចាដែលគេបានចងក្រងជាកូដ ដើម្បី ការពារនឹងថែរក្សា កូនចិញ្ចឹមព្រមទាំងសត្វក្នុងព្រៃនេះទាំងអស់ . ភាពយន្តនិងធ្វើឲ្យអ្នកសើច រំភើប និង ទឹកភ្នែកដោយមិនដឹងខ្លួន .
overview_en: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz is stranded on an uninhabited island. To survive the harsh environment, Roz bonds with the island's animals and cares for an orphaned baby goose.

title_khmer: ប្រយុទ្ធដើម្បីទឹកដី RRR
overview: មិត្តភាពនៃបុរសពីរនាក់បានជួបគ្នាម្ដងទៀតក្នុងគោលបំណងផ្សេងគ្នា ដើម្បីប្រយុទ្ធប្រឆាំងការពារមនុស្សជាទីស្រឡាញ់និងទឹកដីរបស់ពួកគេ…….
overview_en: A fictional history of two legendary revolutionaries' journey away from home before they began fighting for their country in the 1920s.

title_khmer: ប្រមាញ់ឃាតករលាក់មុខ I, the Executioner
overview: The veteran detective Seo Do-cheol and his team at Major Crimes, relentless in their pursuit of criminals, join forces with rookie cop Park Sun-woo to track down a serial killer who has plunged the nation into turmoil.
overview_en: The veteran detective Seo Do-cheol and his team at Major Crimes, relentless in their pursuit of criminals, join forces with rookie cop Park Sun-woo to track down a serial killer who has plunged the nation into turmoil.

title_khmer: អេលៀន : មច្ចុរាជក្នុងលំហ Alien: Romulus
overview: ពួកគេបានប្រទះយានមួយនៅអណ្តែតលើលំហ ពួកគេក៏ចូលទៅយាននោះដើម្បីយកប្រេងទុកធ្វើដំណើរ ស្រាប់តែពួកគេបានជួបនឹង….
overview_en: While scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station, a group of young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe.

title_khmer: Godzilla ដែនបិសាចមច្ចុរាជ
title_english: Godzilla ដែនបិសាចមច្ចុរាជ
overview: ក្រោយពីចាញ់សង្គ្រាមលោកលើកទីពីរដោយគ្រាប់បែកប្រល័យលោកនុយក្លេអែរ ប្រទេសជប៉ុនស្រាប់តែជួបសោកនាដកម្មថ្មី ដោយបានដាស់សត្វអម្បូយក្ស ពីក្នុងសមុទ្ទចេញមកបំផ្លេចបំផ្លាញបន្ថែមទៀតធ្វើឲ្យជប៉ុនស្ទើរាបដល់ដី ដោយដឹងថាអម្បូរ សត្វយក្សនោះគឺ  Godzilla

title_khmer: សំណើចក្រុមរាំទន្ទ្រាំភូមិ – Victory
overview: A coming-of-age story and a feel-great, rip-roaring romp about a group of high school girls who shake a sleepy town alive with pom-poms and perfectly synchronized cheerleading routines.
overview_en: A group of POWs in a German prison camp during World War II play the German National Soccer Team in this powerful film depicting the role of prisoners during wartime.

title_khmer: បេសកកម្មកម្ចាត់ទាហាន Zombies – Overlord
overview: នៅអំឡុងសម័យសង្គ្រាមលោកលើកទី 2 មានបេសកកម្មមួយដើម្បីចូលវាយឆ្មក់ពួកណាស៊ីអាល្លឺម៉ង់ ប៉ុន្តែខុសពីការគ្រោងទុក ដោយពួកណាស៊ីអាល្លឺម៉ង់ ទាំងនោះវាមិនមែនជាមនុស្សឡើយ វាជាបិសាចទាហាន.
overview_en: France, June 1944. On the eve of D-Day, some American paratroopers fall behind enemy lines after their aircraft crashes while on a mission to destroy a radio tower in a small village near the beaches of Normandy. After reaching their target, the surviving paratroopers realise that, in addition to fighting the Nazi troops that patrol the village, they also must fight against something else.

title_khmer: ឃាតកម្មកំបាំងមុខ A Place Called Silence
overview: ” ឃាតកម្មកំបាំងមុខ ”  កម្មសងដោយកម្ម វាជាការដាក់ទោសនឹងសងភាពអយុត្តិធម៌ដោយគ្មានការលើកលែង  .
overview_en: Chen Yutong, a girl's middle school student, was bullied at school, but her mother Li Han was unable to save her daughter from the "hell." Everyone around her turned a blind eye, and a collective silence brewed greater violence.

title_khmer: ផ្នូរអំពិលអំពែក – Grave of the Fireflies
overview: Hisako loses her home in Tokyo to Allied bombing. With her husband fighting somewhere in Asia, she and her two children evacuate to a suburb of Kobe, where they share a house with Hisako's cousin, Kyoko. Kobe is bombed and Kyoko is killed. Hisako is forced to take care of Kyoko's two children in addition to her own, but there is not enough food for everyone.
overview_en: Hisako loses her home in Tokyo to Allied bombing. With her husband fighting somewhere in Asia, she and her two children evacuate to a suburb of Kobe, where they share a house with Hisako's cousin, Kyoko. Kobe is bombed and Kyoko is killed. Hisako is forced to take care of Kyoko's two children in addition to her own, but there is not enough food for everyone.

title_khmer: ឈ្មោះខ្ញុំគឺឡូវគឺវ៉ាន់ – My Name Is Loh Kiwan
overview: ” ឈ្មោះខ្ញុំគឺ ឡូវគឺវ៉ាន់ ” ជាសាច់រឿងរបស់ជនភៀសខ្លួន​ម្នាក់ដែលមានឈ្មោះ​ ឡូវគឺវ៉ាន់ បានភៀសខ្លួន​ចេញពីកូរ៉េខាងជេីង​មកដល់ទឹកដី​ អឺរ៉ុប​ ហេីយដំណេីររឿងទាំងស្រុងក៏បានលម្អិតក្នុងផ្ទៃរឿងទាំងមូល​ .
overview_en: After defecting from North Korea, Loh Kiwan struggles to obtain refugee status in Belgium, where he encounters a dejected woman who has lost all hope.

title_khmer: សារធាតុចម្លែក – The Substance
overview: ជាសារធាតុ​ចម្លែកម្យ៉ាង​ ដែលជួយឱ្យមនុស្ស​ ក្មេងម្តងទៀតបាន​ សក​ ខ្លួនដូចពស់ចឹង​ , តែវាមិនមែនជាថ្នាំដែលជួយដល់សម្រស់ឡេីយ​ វាជាសារធាតុ​ សាហាវដូចបិសាចទៅវិញ​
overview_en: A fading celebrity decides to use a black market drug, a cell-replicating substance that temporarily creates a younger, better version of herself.

title_khmer: ផែនការទម្លុះគុក ឌឹសសេងឃ៍ – The Shawshank Redemption
overview: អេនឌី ឌូហ្រ្វិន ត្រូវបានរង់ការចោទប្រកាន់ពីបទសម្លាប់ប្រពន្ធរបស់ខ្លួន និងសាហាយរបស់នាង។ ឌូហ្វ្រិន ត្រូវបានតុលាការកាត់ទោសឱ្យជាប់គុក ពីរជាតិ។ គាត់ពិតជាមិនសុខចិត្តទេ។ នៅក្នុងគុកគាត់តែមានសង្ឃឹមថា នៅថ្ងៃណាមួយគាត់នឹងអាចរត់គេចខ្លួនរួច។ គាត់បានឱ្យអ្នកដែលស្គាល់គាត់ ពិសេស គឺ រ៉េដដែលជាអ្នកជិតដិតនឹងគាត់ ឱ្យយករបស់ដែលគាត់ចង់បាន ពិសេសគឺញញួរតូចមួយ ព្រោះរ៉េដ អាចរករបស់ទាំងនោះបាន។ ឌូហ្រ្វិន បានសួររ៉េដថា បើចង់ជីកទម្លុះជញ្ជាំងគុកនោះបាន មនុស្សម្នាក់ត្រូវចំណាយពេលប៉ុន្មាន? រ៉េដ ថាយ៉ាងហោចក៏ ៦០០ឆ្នាំដែរ តែ អេនឌី​ ឌូហ្វ្រិន នៅតែមិនអស់អសង្ឃឹមទេ។ ជីវិតនៅក្នុងគុក ធ្វើឱ្យឱ្យអេនឌីពិបាកណាស់។ គាត់ត្រូវបាន ក្រុមប្រុសស៊ីប្រុសធ្វើបាបជាច្រើនដង គឺដូចជាត្រូេវរង់ទណ្ឌកម្មច្រើនសារដែរ។ ដោយសារ អេនឌី ជាមនុស្សពូកែ គាត់ត្រូវបានប្រធានគុក ណតថិន ឱ្យមកធ្វើការដូចជាជំនួយការចឹង។ អេនឌី បានដឹងពីទង្វើដ៏អក្រក់របស់ប្រធានគុកនោះទាំងអស់។ គាត់ក៏បានរៀបចំផែនការ បំផ្លាញប្រធានគុកនោះ ដោយបានសរសេរសំបុត្រលួចលាក់ផ្ញើទៅ ព្រឹទ្ធសភា។ ចំណែកឯផែនការទម្លុះគុកវិញ គាត់តែងជីកថ្ម ដោយញញួរតូចនោះ ម្ដងបន្តិចៗ រីឯងកំទេចថ្មគាត់ដាក់នៅក្នុងហោប៉ៅខោ រួចយកទៅចោលនៅទីលានហាត់ប្រាណ។ នៅឆ្នាំ ១៩៦៦ អេនឌី ក៏ជីកទម្លុះជញ្ជាំងគុកនោះបានសម្រេច ដោយចំណាយពេលមិនដល់ ២០ឆ្នាំទេ។ ហើយវាក៏ជាពេល ដែលគ្រប់យ៉ាងត្រូវបានលាតត្រដាងពីអំពោះពុករលួយរបស់ប្រធានគុកនោះ។ ដោយមិនចង់ឱ្យគេចាប់ខ្លួន ប្រធានគុក ណតថិន ក៏បានបាញ់សម្លាប់ខ្លួនឯង។ មុនពេលចាកចេញ អេនឌី ធ្លាប់បាននិយាយជាមួយ រ៉េដ ដែលជាមិត្តស្និតស្នាលបំផុតថា ” បើរ៉េដបានចេញពីគុក កុំភ្លេចទៅរកដើមឈើធំមួយ នៅវាលស្មៅនៅ (Boxton) នៅក្រោមនោះមានប្រអប់មួយ និងលុយមួយចំនួន។ លុយនោះគឺទុកឱ្យ រ៉េដ ធ្វើដំណោះរទៅជួបគាត់នៅ មហាសមុត្រ ប៉ាស៊ីហ្វីក គឺនៅ ម៉េចស៊ីកូ។ ទីបំផុតអ្នកទាំងពីរក៏បានជួបគ្នា ដូចការសន្យា។
overview_en: Imprisoned in the 1940s for the double murder of his wife and her lover, upstanding banker Andy Dufresne begins a new life at the Shawshank prison, where he puts his accounting skills to work for an amoral warden. During his long stretch in prison, Dufresne comes to be admired by the other inmates -- including an older prisoner named Red -- for his integrity and unquenchable sense of hope.

title_khmer: បេសកកម្មក្នុងសុបិន – Inception
overview: Cobb, a skilled thief who commits corporate espionage by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets is offered a chance to regain his old life as payment for a task considered to be impossible: "inception", the implantation of another person's idea into a target's subconscious.
overview_en: Cobb, a skilled thief who commits corporate espionage by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets is offered a chance to regain his old life as payment for a task considered to be impossible: "inception", the implantation of another person's idea into a target's subconscious.

title_khmer: ពូពីឡុតមុខខ្ជូត – Pilot
overview: ដេីម្បីរក្សាកាងារជា​ ពីឡុត​ ” នាង​ ” អទេ​! ! ! ” គាត់ ” បានតស៊ូហ៊ានធ្វេីគ្រប់យ៉ាង​ រឿង​ ” ពូពីឡុតមុខខ្ជូត​ “
overview_en: Han Jung-woo, a pilot with top-class skills, is flying high and even appears on a famous TV show. But everything comes crashing down when a careless mistake causes him to lose everything, even his job. Blacklisted in the industry, no airline is willing to hire him. Desperate with no other choice, Han Jung-woo transforms completely into his younger sister's identity and succeeds in landing a job as a pilot.

title_khmer: បេះដូងពណ៌ស្វាយ – Purple Hearts
overview: ជាអាពាហ៍ពិពាហ៍ដែលមិនបានតាំងចិត្ត ជាស្នេហាដែលមិនច្បាស់ថាពិតឬក្លែងក្លាយ ជាបេះដូងដែលមិនប្រាកដថាជាពណ៌ក្រហមឬក៏ខៀវ វាទៅជាពណ៌ស្វាយ.
overview_en: An aspiring musician agrees to a marriage of convenience with a soon-to-deploy Marine, but a tragedy soon turns their fake relationship all too real.

title_khmer: គ្រួសារសេដ្ឋីបែកឆ្វេង Successor
overview: ព្រោះតែចង់ឱ្យកូនមានភាពខ្លាំងមានសម្ថភាព​រឹងមាំដេីម្បី​គ្រប់គ្រងនិងស្នងមរតកវាល់លាន​កំពូលមហាសេដ្ឋីម្នាក់បានរៀបចំផែនការដ៏លំបាកនិងចម្លែកដេីម្បីបណ្តុះបណ្តាលកូនប្រុស​ហេីយក៏កេីតរឿង​ អស់សំណេីចជាច្រេីនដែលនឹកស្មានមិនដល់​ .។
overview_en: Ma Chenggang, a wealthy man in Xihong City, worries that his eldest son is too spoiled to succeed him. Determined to raise a capable successor, he takes an unconventional approach. They conceal their wealth, moving the family to a dilapidated neighborhood, and maintain an illusion of poverty, so that his son could develop qualities such as hard work, knowledge, careful budgeting, physical fitness, and perseverance.

title_khmer: ពូជូស កំពូលខ្មោចនាំរឿង Beetlejuice
overview: កុំឱ្យហៅឈ្មោះគេ​ 3 ដង​ បេីហៅឈ្មោះគេគ្រប់​ 3 ដង​ គេនឹងចេញមក​ភ្លាមគេនោះគឺ​ ” ពូជូសកំពូលខ្មោចនាំរឿង​ “​ ​ នឹងមានជូនទស្សនានៅថ្ងៃ​ សៅរ៍​ ទី09 នេះហេីយ​ នៅលេី​ website: KhDiaMonD
overview_en: After a family tragedy, three generations of the Deetz family return home to Winter River. Still haunted by Betelgeuse, Lydia's life is turned upside down when her teenage daughter, Astrid, accidentally opens the portal to the Afterlife.

title_khmer: វិញ្ញាណធ្មប់សណ្ឋិត May the Devil Take You
overview: Hoping to find answers to her estranged father’s mysterious illness, a young woman visits his old villa and uncovers a horrifying truth from the past.
overview_en: Hoping to find answers to her estranged father's mysterious illness, a young woman visits his old villa and uncovers a horrifying truth from the past.

title_khmer: អន្ទាក់មរណៈ Trap
overview: ថ្រែភ៍ (Trap) ជាខ្សែភាពយន្តថ្មីដ៏ទាក់ទាញបំផុតមួយ ដែលនិយាយពីបេសកកម្មតាមប្រមាញ់បុរសរោគចិត្តម្នាក់ ដែលគេតែងតែងធ្វើការចាប់បង្ឃាំង និងសម្លាប់មនុស្សដែលគ្មានកំហុស យកទៅសម្លាប់ជាបន្តបន្ទាប់។ ប៉ុន្តែ ដោយសារតែចិត្តស្រលាញ់ខ្លាំងលើកូនស្រីរបស់គេ គេក៏បានធ្លោយខ្លួនធ្លាក់ចូលក្នុងអន្ទាក់ឡោមព័ទ្ធរបស់ប៉ូលិសយ៉ាងតឹងរឹងក្នុងការប្រគុំខនសឺតរបស់តារាស្រី ឡេឌី រ៉េវិន។ ប៊ូតឆឺ ដែលគេស្គាល់ថាជាឃាតកររោគចិត្តនោះ បានព្យាយាមរិះរកគ្រប់មធ្យោបាយ ដើម្បីគេចចេញពីអន្ទាក់ចាប់ខ្លួនរបស់ប៉ូលិស រហូតឈានដល់ការចាប់ជំរិត និងគំរាមសម្លាប់មនុស្សផ្សេងជាបន្តបន្ទាប់។ តែយ៉ាងណា លទ្ធផលចុងក្រោយ កំពូលឃាតករជំនាញម្នាក់នេះ ក៏នៅតែត្រូវអស់លក្ខណ៍ ក្រោមការប្រើល្បិចទល់ល្បិចរបស់តារាចម្រៀងស្រីល្បីឈ្មោះ ឡេឌី រ៉េវិន។
overview_en: An undercover DEA agent and his partner embark on a game of cat and mouse with an audacious, and surprising group of thieves – their own rebellious teenagers, who have begun robbing from a dangerous cartel, using their parents' tactics and top-secret intel to do it.

title_khmer: គេចពីដីនរក Escape
overview: ឈ្មោះ ឃ្យូណាម។ ដោយសារតែមានគំនាបខ្លាំងពីថ្នាក់លើ និងការជិះជាន់បំបិទសិទ្ធសេរីភាពជាបន្តបន្ទាប់ ឃ្យូណាមក៏បានចាប់ផ្តើមរៀបចំគម្រោង លួចរត់គេចចេញពីកូរ៉េខាងជើង បំណងទៅកូរ៉េខាងត្បូង។ ប៉ុន្តែជាចៃដន្យអាក្រក់ ផែនការរបស់ឃ្យូណាមក៏ត្រូវបានបែកធ្លាយ បន្ទាប់ពី ដុងយុគ ដែលជាមិត្តរួមកងពល បានស៊ើបដឹងពីគម្រោងរបស់គេ និងចង់រត់គេចពីកូរ៉េខាងជើងជាមួយគេដែរ រហូតនាំឱ្យពួកគេត្រូវឈានដល់ការចាប់ខ្លួនទាំងពីរនាក់ និងយកទៅឃុំនៅប៉ុស្តិ៍យុនប៉ុងរី។ ក្រោយមក ឃ្យូណាម ក៏ទទួលបានការធានាឱ្យនៅក្រៅឃុំពីសំណាក់អតីតមិត្តរួមសាលា ដែលបច្ចុប្បន្នជាមន្ត្រីថ្នាក់ខ្ពស់គឺ ឧត្តមសេនីយ លី យុនសាំង។ ដោយស្ថានភាពបង្ខំ បន្ទាប់ពីបានគេចរួចខ្លួនពីការចោទប្រកាន់ភ្លាម ឃ្យូណាម គេបានបន្តការរិះរកគ្រប់មធ្យោបាយដើម្បីអាចសម្រេចបំណងរបស់ខ្លួនដែលបានគិតប៉ងមកជាយូរ ដោយប្រថុយ បន្លំចូលក្លែងបន្លំឯកសារពាក់ព័ន្ធមួយចំនួន ក្នុងចេតនាវិលត្រឡប់ទៅមូលដ្ឋានដើមវិញ តែក៏ត្រូវបានកម្លាំងល្បាតប្រចាំតំបន់យុនបូរី ធ្វើការឃាតិសួរនាំ។ តែដោយការកុហកមុខស្ងួត ទីបំផុតគេអាចបោកពួកមន្ត្រីល្បាតទាំងនោះបាន ហើយព្រមទាំងបានជួយ ដុងយុគ ឱ្យចេញពីប៉ុស្តិ៍ឃុំឃាំងនោះ និងមករួមដំណើររត់គេចជាមួយគ្នា។ តែយ៉ាងណា ក្នុងដំណើរនេះ ពួកគេត្រូវជួបឧបសគ្គស្ទើរស្លាប់រស់ជាច្រើនដំណាក់កាល ជាពិសេសពីការតាមចាប់ខ្លួន និងការបាញ់សម្លាប់របស់ឧត្តមសេនីយ លី យុនសាំង។ លទ្ធផលចុងក្រោយ សំណាញ់មច្ចុរាជ ក៏នៅតែមិនបានបន្ធូរដៃឡើយលើពួកគេ។ ដូច្នេះ តើពួកគេនឹងអាចនៅមានជីវិត និងសម្រេចបំណងចង់រត់គេចពីកូរ៉េខាងជើងបានឬយ៉ាងណា? ចង់ដឹងច្បាស់ កុំភ្លេចចូលទៅទស្សនារឿងពេញ ដែលមាននៅក្នុងវេបសាយ khdiamond ផ្ទាល់។
overview_en: Ray Breslin is the world's foremost authority on structural security. After analyzing every high security prison and learning a vast array of survival skills so he can design escape-proof prisons, his skills are put to the test. He's framed and incarcerated in a master prison he designed himself. He needs to escape and find the person who put him behind bars.

title_khmer: វិថីនៃក្តីសង្ឃឹម – La La Land
overview: Mia, an aspiring actress, serves lattes to movie stars in between auditions and Sebastian, a jazz musician, scrapes by playing cocktail party gigs in dingy bars, but as success mounts they are faced with decisions that begin to fray the fragile fabric of their love affair, and the dreams they worked so hard to maintain in each other threaten to rip them apart.
overview_en: Mia, an aspiring actress, serves lattes to movie stars in between auditions and Sebastian, a jazz musician, scrapes by playing cocktail party gigs in dingy bars, but as success mounts they are faced with decisions that begin to fray the fragile fabric of their love affair, and the dreams they worked so hard to maintain in each other threaten to rip them apart.

title_khmer: អច្ឆរិយបញ្ញាសិប្បនិម្មិត – Transcendence
overview: Two leading computer scientists work toward their goal of Technological Singularity,  as a radical anti-technology organization fights to prevent them from creating a world where computers can transcend the abilities of the human brain.
overview_en: Two leading computer scientists work toward their goal of Technological Singularity,  as a radical anti-technology organization fights to prevent them from creating a world where computers can transcend the abilities of the human brain.

title_khmer: កូនទានាំស្នេហ៍ – Welcome to My Side
overview: Chen Xiaozhou បានជួបឧបទ្ទវហេតុមួយបន្ទាប់ ហើយចាប់តាំងពីពេលនោះមក គាត់តែងតែឃើញ កូនទាកៅស៊ូមួយក្រុមធំ ដែលនាំមកនូវឧបសគ្គដ៏ធំដល់ជីវិតរបស់គេ រហូត​ដល់​លេច​មុខ​នារី​ម្នាក់​ឈ្មោះ Feng Jianan
overview_en: Chen Xiaozhou suffered an accident after falling out of love, and since then he has often seen large groups of “quacking” rubber ducks, which has brought great obstacles to Chen Xiaozhou's life. Until a girl named Feng Jianan appears, Chen Xiaozhou is surprised to find that as long as he is with Feng Jianan, the ducks won't run out to make trouble, and a hilarious romantic journey begins.

title_khmer: វាសនាផ្កាយតូច – Like Stars on Earth
overview: Ishaan Awasthi is an eight-year-old whose world is filled with wonders that no one else seems to appreciate. Colours, fish, dogs, and kites don’t seem important to the adults, who are much more interested in things like homework, marks, and neatness. Ishaan cannot seem to get anything right in class; he is then sent to boarding school, where his life changes forever.
overview_en: Ishaan Awasthi is an eight-year-old whose world is filled with wonders that no one else seems to appreciate. Colours, fish, dogs, and kites don't seem important to the adults, who are much more interested in things like homework, marks, and neatness. Ishaan cannot seem to get anything right in class; he is then sent to boarding school, where his life changes forever.

title_khmer: លោកមន្ត្រីខ្សែក្រវាត់ខ្មៅ – Officer Black Belt
overview: A talented martial artist who can't walk past a person in need unites with a probation officer to fight and prevent crime as a martial arts officer.
overview_en: A talented martial artist who can't walk past a person in need unites with a probation officer to fight and prevent crime as a martial arts officer.

title_khmer: បណ្តាសាទាយាទ – Hereditary
overview: Following the death of the Leigh family matriarch, Annie and her children uncover disturbing secrets about their heritage. Their daily lives are not only impacted, but they also become entangled in a chilling fate from which they cannot escape, driving them to the brink of madness.
overview_en: Following the death of the Leigh family matriarch, Annie and her children uncover disturbing secrets about their heritage. Their daily lives are not only impacted, but they also become entangled in a chilling fate from which they cannot escape, driving them to the brink of madness.

title_khmer: គ្រួសារទាហេងស៊យ – Migration
overview: After a migrating duck family alights on their pond with thrilling tales of far-flung places, the Mallard family embarks on a family road trip, from New England, to New York City, to tropical Jamaica.
overview_en: Having found the safety of the Greenland bunker after the comet Clarke decimated the Earth, the Garrity family must now risk everything to embark on a perilous journey across the wasteland of Europe to find a new home.

title_khmer: សម្លាញ់ឡឺកឺទាំងបី – 3 Idiots
overview: ពួកយេីងបានដឹងទឹកដៃរឿង​ ” PK មនុស្សភពផ្កាយ​ ” រួចមកហេីយថា​រឿងនោះវាកំប្លែងនិងមានអត្ថន័យអប់រំខ្លាំងប៉ុណ្ណា , ពេលនេះទាំងតួអង្គ​ PK និង​ director បានមក​ក្រឡុក​ទៀតហេីយ​ ត្រៀម​សេីចផ្អេីលភូមិទៀតឱ្យហេីយទៅ
overview_en: Rascal. Joker. Dreamer. Genius... You've never met a college student quite like "Rancho." From the moment he arrives at India's most prestigious university, Rancho's outlandish schemes turn the campus upside down—along with the lives of his two newfound best friends. Together, they make life miserable for "Virus," the school’s uptight and heartless dean. But when Rancho catches the eye of the dean's daughter, Virus sets his sights on flunking out the "3 idiots" once and for all.

title_khmer: ខេនស៊ីន វីរបុរសសាមូរ៉ៃ វគ្គ 5 : កាលផ្តើមដំបូង – Rurouni Kenshin: The Beginning
overview: ឃើញថាវគ្គបញ្ចប់របស់ខេនស៊ីន បានបញ្ចប់ទៅដោយសន្តិភាពនិងសន្សល់ទុកនូវការចងចាំដ៏ល្អ , ប៉ុន្តែមុននឹងមានការបញ្ចប់ដ៏ល្អតើវាមានភាពខ្មៅងងឹត និង ជូជត់ខ្លាំងបែបណាខ្លះ? សូមមកដឹងពីមូលហេតុផ្តើមដំបូងនៃការបញ្ចប់.
overview_en: Before he was a protector, Kenshin was a fearsome assassin known as Battosai. But when he meets gentle Tomoe Yukishiro, a beautiful young woman who carries a huge burden in her heart, his life will change forever.

title_khmer: កំពូលក្លើបែកម៊ាំទាំងបួន – The Last Frenzy
overview: សល់ពេលតែ 10 ថ្ងៃប៉ុណ្ណោះសម្រាប់ជីវិតចុងក្រោយរបស់គេដោយយល់ថាគ្មានសង្ឃឹមអាចរស់ទៀតគេក៏ចំណាយលុយសន្សំក្នុងជីវិតគេទាំងប៉ុន្មាន ហៅមិត្តសំណ្វរបស់គេតាំងពីក្មេងបីនាក់ទៀតដើម្បីដើរចាយសើយសុខសម្រាប់ជីវិត 10ថ្ងៃចុងក្រោយរបស់គេ
overview_en: Jia You Wei, a middle-aged man who has accomplished nothing, is diagnosed with a brain tumor and has only ten days left to live. He sells his old house, rumored to be demolished and reunites with several others who used to live there. They decide to indulge themselves in the final ten days of their lives. In this way, the quintet who parted ways 22 years ago in the family compound gathered together once again, only to realize that each of them has faced their own hardships in life.

title_khmer: ដេតភូល & វលវឺរីន – Deadpool & Wolverine
overview: A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life with his days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. But when his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctant Wolverine.
overview_en: A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life with his days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. But when his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctant Wolverine.

title_khmer: ជម្លោះចក្រវាលអារម្មណ៍ វគ្គ ២ – Inside Out 2
overview: កុំថាឡើយមនុស្សតែងតែមានជម្លោះ សូម្បីតែអារម្មណ៍ក្នុងខ្លូនយើងក៏មានជម្លោះទាស់
overview_en: Teenager Riley's mind headquarters is undergoing a sudden demolition to make room for something entirely unexpected: new Emotions! Joy, Sadness, Anger, Fear and Disgust, who’ve long been running a successful operation by all accounts, aren’t sure how to feel when Anxiety shows up. And it looks like she’s not alone.

title_khmer: ខេនស៊ីន វីរបុរសសាមូរ៉ៃ វគ្គ 4 : វគ្គបញ្ចប់ Rurouni Kenshin: The Final
overview: In 1879, Kenshin and his allies face their strongest enemy yet: his former brother-in-law Enishi Yukishiro and his minions, who've vowed their revenge.
overview_en: In 1879, Kenshin and his allies face their strongest enemy yet: his former brother-in-law Enishi Yukishiro and his minions, who've vowed their revenge.

title_khmer: សោកនាដកម្មលើយន្តហោះឆ្នាំ ១៩៧១
title_english: សោកនាដកម្មលើយន្តហោះឆ្នាំ ១៩៧១

title_khmer: ខេនស៊ីន វគ្គ3 : ដំណើរបញ្ចប់ជើងខ្លាំងចុងក្រោយ – Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends
title_english: Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends
overview: វគ្គមុនក៏ព្រោះតែលោតចូលសមុទ្ទជួយខាវរ៉ូ ខេនស៊ីនក៏មិនទាន់បានប្រយុទ្ធចាញ់ឈ្នះជាមួយនឹង សុីសុីអូ នៅឡើយទេ , ការប្រយុទ្ធស្លាប់រស់នឹងសម្រេចលើវគ្គនេះ តើខេនសុីនអាចសំលាប់ សុីសុីអូ ដើម្បីសង្គ្រោះប្រទេសជប៉ុនបានដែរឬទេ?
overview_en: Shishio sets sail in his ironclad ship to bring down the government. In order to stop him, Kenshin trains with his old master to learn his final technique.

title_khmer: ចាប់ជំរិតតារាល្បី Hostage: Missing Celebrity
overview: ជាតារាល្បីលំដាប់ម្នាក់ស្រាប់តែធ្លាក់ទៅក្នុងដៃរបស់ក្រុមចោរចាប់ជំរិតដ៏ព្រៃផ្សៃមួយក្រុម.
overview_en: A box office star has to prove his action credentials in the real world when he's kidnapped and held for ransom.

title_khmer: តំណាលបន្តោងគជ់ឆ្លងសម័យ A Legend
overview: ឆិនឡុង​ គាត់មិនដែលឆ្លងភពទេ​ មានតែឆ្លងសម័យឬ​ ឆ្លងពេលវេលា​ ឬ​ ឆ្លងជាតិ​ ព្រោះមិនដែលឃេីញគាត់ឆ្លងទៅដល់​ ភពអង្គា​ ភពអាទិត្យអីទេ​ , ចឹងល្មមឈប់ទៅអាពាក្យ​ អីទិចឆ្លងភព​ ៗអីហ្នឹង​ កុំខុសតាមគ្នា​.
overview_en: During the Kadamba reign, King Vijayendra, the ruler of the fictional feudatory land of Bangra, meets his final fate while venturing into the mystical forest of Kantara. Witnessing this, his son Rajashekara seals the borders of their realm. Later, Prince Kulashekara reopens them through a brutal massacre. The protagonist, Berme, in search of prosperity, crosses the divide and ignites a conflict of faith, power, and destiny between the Kingdom and Nature.

title_khmer: ខេនស៊ីន វីរបុរស សាមូរ៉ៃ វគ្គ 2 Rurouni Kenshin Part II: Kyoto Inferno
title_english: Rurouni Kenshin Part II: Kyoto Inferno
overview: ដំណើរផ្សងព្រេងបន្ត របស់ស្តេច ដាវសាមូរ៉ៃ ខេនស៊ីន និងកែប្រែជោគវាសនារបស់ប្រទេសជប៉ុនទាំងមូលចេញពីភាពបះបោរបំផ្លាញដោយក្រុមដាវ កាន់សាមូរ៉ៃមួយក្រុម, ពេលនេះដាវរបស់ ខេនស៊ីននឹងដកចេញពីស្រោមម្តងទៀតដើម្បីការពារប្រទេស.
overview_en: Kenshin has settled into his new life with Kaoru and his other friends when he is approached with a request from the Meiji government. Makoto Shishio, a former assassin like Kenshin, was betrayed, set on fire and left for dead. He survived, and is now in Kyoto, plotting with his gathered warriors to overthrow the new government. Against Kaoru's wishes, Kenshin reluctantly agrees to go to Kyoto and help keep his country from falling back into civil war.

title_khmer: បន្ទប់ជួលនរក BaBarian
overview: នារីវ័យក្មេងម្នាក់បានរកបន្ទប់ជួលទាំងយប់ នាងក៏បានជួលខុសបន្ទប់  ហើយក៏មានបុរសចម្លែកម្នាក់បានស្នាក់នៅទីនោះរួចហើយ ដោយគ្មានជម្រើស  នាងសម្រេចចិត្តស្នាក់នៅមួយយប់

title_khmer: ព្យុះមច្ចុរាជ Twisters
overview: មនុស្សប៉ុន្មាននាក់គឺពួកគាត់ជាអ្នកជំនាញប្រមាញ់ព្យុះ ដើម្បីកុំអោយព្យុះនោះបង្ករទៅគ្រោះមហន្តរាយដល់ប្រជាជន ។
overview_en: As storm season intensifies, the paths of former storm chaser Kate Carter and reckless social-media superstar Tyler Owens collide when terrifying phenomena never seen before are unleashed. The pair and their competing teams find themselves squarely in the paths of multiple storm systems converging over central Oklahoma in the fight of their lives.

title_khmer: ខេនស៊ីន វីរបុរស សាមូរ៉ៃ វគ្គ 1 – Rurouni Kenshin Part I: Origins
overview: ប្ដូរពីឃាតករដៃឆើតដែលសម្លាប់មនុស្សមិនញញើតដៃ ប្រែក្លាយជាអ្នកដើរផ្សងព្រេងសាមញ្ញម្នាក់។ ខេនស៊ីន ធ្លាប់ជាឃាតករដ៏សាហាវ បានស្បថថានឹងឈប់ប្រើដាវសម្លាប់មនុស្ស តែប្រើសម្រាប់ការពារជីវិតមនុស្សវិញ។ ខេនស៊ីន បានដើរផ្សងព្រេង ដើម្បីការពារ និងស្វែងរកសុខសន្តិភាពឱ្យអ្នកគ្រប់គ្នា។
overview_en: In 1868, after the Bakumatsu war ends, the ex-assassin Kenshin Himura traverses Japan with an inverted sword, to defend the needy without killing.

title_khmer: ទឹកចិត្តនារីពេស្យាហ្គាងហ្គូបៃ Gangubai Kathiawadi
overview: Duped and sold to a brothel, a young woman fearlessly reclaims her power, using underworld connections to preside over the world she was once a pawn in.
overview_en: Duped and sold to a brothel, a young woman fearlessly reclaims her power, using underworld connections to preside over the world she was once a pawn in.

title_khmer: បងប្អូនសង្ហាកំពូលស៊យ Handsome Guys
overview: ” ពួកយើងមិនមែនជាអ្នកបង្កបញ្ហាទេ “និយាយពីបងប្អូនពីរនាក់នេះ គិតថាខ្លួនសង្ហាប៉ុណ្ណឹងដែរ តែទៅណាក៏គេគិតថាខ្លួនជាងអ្នកបង្កបញ្ហាទៅវិញ ។
overview_en: Brothers Jae-pil and Sang-gu move into their dream rustic-style house in the woods. When unwanted visitors arrive and awaken a sealed evil spirit in the basement, a dark aura begins to envelop the house.

title_khmer: បេសកកម្មកម្ចាត់ពូភ្លាវ – Despicable Me 4
overview: វគ្គនេះពូភ្លាវ ដែលមានឈ្មោះថា ” Gru ” បានត្រូវបង្ខំចិត្តនាំគ្រួសាររត់គេចខ្លួន​ ដូរអត្តសញ្ញាណ ព្រោះតែសត្រូវរបស់គាត់គឺ ” Maxime Le Mal ” បានរត់ចេញពីគុកដេីម្បីរកគាត់សងសឹក ហើយក៏បង្កើតបេសកកម្មមួយដើម្បីតាមកម្ចាត់ ពូភ្លាវ​ ,
overview_en: Gru and Lucy and their girls—Margo, Edith and Agnes—welcome a new member to the Gru family, Gru Jr., who is intent on tormenting his dad. Gru also faces a new nemesis in Maxime Le Mal and his femme fatale girlfriend Valentina, forcing the family to go on the run.

title_khmer: អាថ៍កំបាំងប្តីខ្ញុំ – While You Were Sleeping
overview: ប្តីប្រពន្ធពួកគេទាំងពីរមានភាពល្អោកល្អើនផ្អែមល្ហែមធម្មតា ស្រាប់តែបន្ទាប់ពីមាន ឧបតហេតុ គ្រោះថ្នាក់ចរាចណ៍ធ្វើឲ្យប្រពន្ធរបស់គេបាត់ការចងចាំ ហើយប្តីរបស់នាងក៏ចាប់ផ្តើមធ្វើអ្វីប្លែកៗ ដូចជាមានអាថ៍កំបាំងអ្វីដែលមិនចង់ឲ្យនាងដឹង
overview_en: A transit worker pulls commuter Peter off railway tracks after he's mugged, but—while he's in a coma—his family mistakenly thinks she's Peter's fiancée, and she doesn't correct them. Things get more complicated when she falls for his brother, who's not quite sure that she's who she claims to be.

title_khmer: ពីងពាងពិស – Infested
overview: ដោយសារតែខ្លួនស្រលាញ់នឹងចូលចិត្តចញ្ចឹមសត្វដែលកម្រមាននៅលើផែនដី បុរសម្នាក់ក៏បានយកសត្វពីងពាងវាលខ្សាច់មួយក្បាលមកផ្ទះ ដោយមិនដឹងថាវាមានពឹសសាហាវបុិនណាឡើយ ហើយថែមទាំងកំពុងមានកូនរាប់សិបក្បាលក្នុងពោះទៀត
overview_en: Residents of a rundown French apartment building battle against an army of deadly, rapidly reproducing spiders.

title_khmer: PK មនុស្សភពផ្កាយ
title_english: PK មនុស្សភពផ្កាយ
overview: PK ជាមនុស្សភពផ្កាយបានធ្លាក់មកដល់ផែនដី ស្រាប់តែបាត់ ឧបករណ៍ដើម្បីភ្ជាប់ទំនាក់ទំនងទៅកាន់ ភពរបស់គាត់ ហើយគាត់ក៏បានព្យាយាមរក ឧបករណ៍ របស់គាត់ពេញផែនដីក៏ជួបប្រទះរឿងជាច្រើនដែលគួរឲ្យអស់សំណើចជាច្រើនដែលពាក់ពន្ធ័នឹងជំនឿសាសនា

title_khmer: វិញ្ញាណឃ្លាំមើល – The Watchers
overview: ស្រាប់តែជាប់នៅក្នុងព្រៃក្នុងតំបន់មួយកន្លែងដែលគ្មាននៅលើផែនទីពិភពលោក គ្រប់គ្រងដោយវិញ្ញាណចម្លែកអាថ៍កំបាំង នឹងតាមឃ្លាំមើលអ្នកគ្រប់ពេល អ្នកនឹងស្លាប់បើអ្នកមិនសម្របតាមវិន័យរបស់វិញ្ញាណឃ្លាំមើល.
overview_en: A young artist gets stranded in an extensive, immaculate forest in western Ireland, where, after finding shelter, she becomes trapped alongside three strangers, stalked by mysterious creatures each night.

title_khmer: អាណាចក្រពិភពស្វាឪ – Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
title_english: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
overview: ជាច្រើនឆ្នាំក្រោយបន្ទាប់ពីសម័យកាលរបស់ស្វាឪដែលមានឈ្មោះសុីសា ក៏មានរឿងវាយដណ្តើមអាណាចក្រនៃខ្សែអម្បូរពូជស្វាឪដែលមានបញ្ញាពិសេសនិងអាចនិយាយភាសាដូចមនុស្ស , ស្វាឪក្មេងមួយក្បាលបានវិនាសព្រាត់ព្រាស់ពីការវាយបំផ្លាញទីជំរក គេក៏តស៊ូព្យាយាមដើម្បីសងសឹក នឹងដណ្តើមរាជហើយនឹងធ្វើការទំនាក់ទំនងបន្តផ្សាភ្ញាប់ឡើងវិញជាមួយនឹងអម្បូរមនុស្ស
overview_en: Several generations following Caesar's reign, apes – now the dominant species – live harmoniously while humans have been reduced to living in the shadows. As a new tyrannical ape leader builds his empire, one young ape undertakes a harrowing journey that will cause him to question all he's known about the past and to make choices that will define a future for apes and humans alike.

title_khmer: បេសកកម្មប្តូរជីវិត Extraction 2
overview: គេចផុតពីការស្លាប់កាលពីវគ្គ១ឥលូវ Tyler Rake បានត្រលប់មកបំពេញបេសកម្មថ្មី ដែលគ្រោះថ្នាក់ខ្លាំងមួយទៀតដោយទៅសង្គ្រោះម្តាយកូន៣នាក់នៅក្នុងគុកដែលពោរពេញទៅដោយពួក Gangsters
overview_en: Back from the brink of death, highly skilled commando Tyler Rake takes on another dangerous mission: saving the imprisoned family of a ruthless gangster.

title_khmer: ល្បែងហៅវិញ្ញាណ – Talk to me
overview: When a group of friends discover how to conjure spirits using an embalmed hand, they become hooked on the new thrill, until one of them goes too far and unleashes terrifying supernatural forces.
overview_en: When a group of friends discover how to conjure spirits using an embalmed hand, they become hooked on the new thrill, until one of them goes too far and unleashes terrifying supernatural forces.

title_khmer: ប៉ូលីសទំនើងចិត្តឆាវ – Bad Boys: Ride or Die
overview: After their late former Captain is framed, Lowrey and Burnett try to clear his name, only to end up on the run themselves.
overview_en: After their late former Captain is framed, Lowrey and Burnett try to clear his name, only to end up on the run themselves.

title_khmer: បិសាចចម្លែក Prey
overview: មិនដឹងថាវាជាសត្វចម្លែក​ ឬ​ ជាអ្វីឱ្យពិតប្រាកដ​ អ្វីដែលដឹង គឺវាសាហាវ​ជាងអ្វីៗទាំងអស់ដែលយេីងធ្លាប់ឃេីញនៅក្នុង​ កុលសម្ព័ន្ធ​និងក្នុងព្រៃនេះ​ .
overview_en: When danger threatens her camp, the fierce and highly skilled Comanche warrior Naru sets out to protect her people. But the prey she stalks turns out to be a highly evolved alien predator with a technically advanced arsenal.

title_khmer: ហ្វ្សូរីអូសា : ពីដំណាល Mad Max – Furiosa
overview: ដំណាលពីដើមកំណើតរបស់អ្នកចម្បាំង Furiosa ដែលបានកែប្រែខ្លួនហ្វឹកហាត់ក្លាយជាអ្នកប្រយុទ្ធលើវាលក្សាច់ដើម្បីសងសឹកជូនម្តាយរបស់នាង មុនពេលនាងជួប និងសហការគ្នាជាមួយ Mad Max
overview_en: As the world falls, young Furiosa is snatched from the Green Place of Many Mothers into the hands of a great biker horde led by the warlord Dementus. Sweeping through the wasteland, they encounter the citadel presided over by Immortan Joe. The two tyrants wage war for dominance, and Furiosa must survive many trials as she puts together the means to find her way home.

title_khmer: ទីក្រុងឧក្រិដ្ឋ : ទណ្ឌកម្មក្តៅ The Roundup 4
overview: ប្រូម៉ាប់ វគ្គនេះបានធ្វើការបង្ក្រាបក្រុមពួក Casino online ខុសច្បាប់  និង ដើម្បីតាមចាប់ខ្លួន  Baek Chang-ki  ដែលបានសម្លាប់មនុស្សជាច្រើនព្រោះតែ Casino online របស់គេ
overview_en: 'Monster Cop' Ma Seok-do investigates an illegal online gambling business led by a former STS Baek and an IT genius CEO Chang. Ma proposes an unexpected alliance to Jang and begins hunting down the criminals.

title_khmer: ការចងចាំដ៏អាថ៍កំបាំង – Forgotten
overview: Jin-seok ហើយនិងគ្រួសាររបស់គេបានរើមកនៅផ្ទះថ្មី ហើយមើលទៅដូចជាមានសុភម្គលដូចគ្រួសារដ៏ទៃ , ប៉ុន្តែគេដូចជាមានជំងឺបាត់ការចងចាំនិងចេះតែមានអារម្មណ៍នឹកឃើញអ្វីចម្លែកៗក្រោយពីចូលនៅក្នុងផ្ទះនោះ
overview_en: A once-respected surgeon who's lost his family and his memory gets a chance at redemption when he reconnects with someone from his forgotten past.

title_khmer: ថ្ងៃអស្ចារ្យអាសំណព្វ – Dog Days
overview: សាច់រឿងនេះនឹងវាយចំបេះដូងអ្នកដែលស្រឡាញ់សត្វចិញ្ចឹមអ្នកនឹងរំភើបកំសត់ជាមួយវា ហើយនឹងផ្សាភ្ជាប់អំពីទំនាក់ទំនងក្តីស្រឡាញ់និងពេលវេលារវាងគ្នានិងគ្នា មិនថាមនុស្សឬសត្វចិញ្ចឹម គឺសុទ្ធតែមានបេះដូងនិងក្តីស្រឡាញ់មិនអាចខ្វះបាន។
overview_en: Elizabeth, a charming morning show news anchor, seeks advice from her dog's therapist after a breakup. Tara, a spunky barista, dreams of a life beyond the coffee shop. Awkward Garrett pines for Tara while trying to keep his adopt-a-dog business afloat. Dax is a man-child and leader of the aspiring rock band Frunk. Grace and Kurt anxiously await the arrival of their adoptive daughter, Amelia. Walter, an aging, lonely widower, loses his dog Mabel when she runs off. The beloved canines in their lives soon start to influence their careers, friendships, and romantic relationships in funny and unexpected ways.

title_khmer: មួយរាត្រីនៃការតាមសម្លាប់ – Midnight
overview: ពីនាក់ម្តាយនិងកូនស្រីដែលពិកា គថ្លង់ បានប្រទះឃើញហេតុការណ៍នៃការសម្លាប់របស់ឃាតកររោគចិត្តម្នាក់ ,នាងក៏បានរត់គេចពីការតាមសម្លាប់ពីឃាតកររោគចិត្តម្នាក់នោះព្រោះតែឃាតករបានឃើញនាង អំឡុងពេលគេកំពុងសំលាប់មនុស្ស
overview_en: Even though a devastating murder took place during a small town's horror film festival two years earlier, townspeople want another festival.

title_khmer: ពូជស្វាចម្បាំង – Monkey Man
overview: Kid is an anonymous young man who ekes out a meager living in an underground fight club where, night after night, wearing a gorilla mask, he is beaten bloody by more popular fighters for cash. After years of suppressed rage, Kid discovers a way to infiltrate the enclave of the city’s sinister elite. As his childhood trauma boils over, his mysteriously scarred hands unleash an explosive campaign of retribution to settle the score with the men who took everything from him.
overview_en: Kid is an anonymous young man who ekes out a meager living in an underground fight club where, night after night, wearing a gorilla mask, he is beaten bloody by more popular fighters for cash. After years of suppressed rage, Kid discovers a way to infiltrate the enclave of the city’s sinister elite. As his childhood trauma boils over, his mysteriously scarred hands unleash an explosive campaign of retribution to settle the score with the men who took everything from him.

title_khmer: តួជំនួសសាច់កម្ម – The Fall Guy
overview: តួសម្តែងជំនួសដ៏សែនសាច់កម្ម ត្រូវជួបរឿងសយៗជាច្រើន ខណៈពេលដែលតារាសម្តែងរួមភាពយន្តរបស់គេក៏ត្រូវបាត់ខ្លួនដោយអាថ៍កំបាំង
overview_en: Fresh off an almost career-ending accident, stuntman Colt Seavers has to track down a missing movie star, solve a conspiracy and try to win back the love of his life while still doing his day job.

title_khmer: ស្នាមញញឹមច្ចុរាជ – Smile
overview: បន្ទាប់ពីឃើញរឿងចម្លែកៗមិនប្រកតីជាច្រើនដែលបានកើតឡើងលើអ្នកជំងឺក្នុងបន្ទប់ជំងឺផ្លូវចិត្ត គ្រូពេទ្យដែលបានព្យាបាលអ្នកជម្ថឺដែលមានអការៈចម្លែកៗខុសពីធម្មតា ដែលយកស្នាមញញឹមដ៏ពិឃាតមកបង្ករ ហើយគ្រូពេទ្យក៏បានរកឃើញអាថ៍កំបាំងនៅពីក្រោយរឿងចម្លែកទាំងអស់ដែលកើតឡើងព្រោះតែផ្លូវងងឹត.
overview_en: After witnessing a bizarre, traumatic incident involving a patient, Dr. Rose Cotter starts experiencing frightening occurrences that she can't explain.

title_khmer: ល្បែងប្រមាញ់មនុស្ស – The Hunt
overview: មនុស្សមួយក្រុមបានដឹងខ្លួនឡើងនៅក្នុងព្រៃមួយដែលពួកគេមិនដឹងថាតំបន់នោះនៅកន្លែងណា ពួកគេក៏ត្រូវបានដេញប្រមាញ់ជីវិតពីក្រុមអ្នកមានមហាសេដ្ឋីមួយក្រុមដែលកំពុងយកជីវិតពួកគេមកលេងក្នុង ល្បែងប្រមាញ់ជីវិត
overview_en: Twelve strangers wake up in a clearing. They don't know where they are—or how they got there. In the shadow of a dark internet conspiracy theory, ruthless elitists gather at a remote location to hunt humans for sport. But their master plan is about to be derailed when one of the hunted turns the tables on her pursuers.

title_khmer: ផ្តន្ទាឃាតកររោគចិត្ត – I Saw the Devil
overview: Kyung-chul is a dangerous psychopath who kills for pleasure. Soo-hyeon, a top-secret agent, decides to track down the murderer himself. He promises himself that he will do everything in his power to take vengeance against the killer, even if it means that he must become a monster himself.
overview_en: Kyung-chul is a dangerous psychopath who kills for pleasure. Soo-hyeon, a top-secret agent, decides to track down the murderer himself. He promises himself that he will do everything in his power to take vengeance against the killer, even if it means that he must become a monster himself.

title_khmer: អ្នកប្រយុទ្ធរាត្រី : ជញ្ជំងក្រុងកៅលុន – Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In
title_english: Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In
overview: កុំចង់បង្កបញ្ហានៅក្រុងកៅឡុន
overview_en: In 1980s Hong Kong, troubled youth Chan Lok-kwun, a mainland refugee, struggles to survive in the Kowloon Walled City by joining underground fights. Betrayed by crime boss Mr. Big while trying to buy a fake ID, he steals drugs from him and seeks refuge in the Walled City, where he encounters Cyclone, a compassionate yet authoritative crime lord.

title_khmer: បណ្តាសាមរណៈ – Ghosts Of War
overview: វិញ្ញាណ​ចងពៀរ​សងសឹកព្រោះតែបណ្តាសា ស្ថិតក្នុងអាថ៌កំបាំងជាច្រេីន​ដែលពួកយេីងមិនដឹង​ ចេញពីគ្រួសាមួយដែលរងការសម្លាប់ដ៏អយុត្តិធម៍.
overview_en: A group of World War II American soldiers encounter a supernatural enemy as they occupy a French castle previously under Nazi control.

title_khmer: សង្គ្រាមស៊ីវិល – Civil War
overview: អ្នកកាសែតមួយក្រុមធ្វើការប្តូរជីវិតដើម្បីតាមថតយករូបភាពសង្គ្រាមផ្ទៃក្នុងដែលធ្វើឪ្យវឹកវ ចលាចល បាញ់សម្លាប់ ពេញប្រទេសអាមេរិក.
overview_en: In the near future, a group of war journalists attempt to survive while reporting the truth as the United States stands on the brink of civil war.

title_khmer: សង្ឃឹមថ្ងៃថ្មី – Better Day
overview: It's a new day for the Gaither Vocal Band! This exciting musical celebration, filmed before an enthusiastic live audience at the Majestic Theatre in San Antonio, Texas, offers a DVD debut of the group's brand new, all-star lineup featuring the voices of: Michael English, Wes Hampton, Mark Lowry, David Phelps and Bill Gaither...plus wonderful guest performances by The Isaacs and Jason Crabb.
overview_en: It's a new day for the Gaither Vocal Band! This exciting musical celebration, filmed before an enthusiastic live audience at the Majestic Theatre in San Antonio, Texas, offers a DVD debut of the group's brand new, all-star lineup featuring the voices of: Michael English, Wes Hampton, Mark Lowry, David Phelps and Bill Gaither...plus wonderful guest performances by The Isaacs and Jason Crabb.

title_khmer: បេសកកម្មសម្ងាត់ 2 : អន្តរជាតិ – Confidential Assignment 2: International
overview: Follows Rim Chul Ryung heading back to South Korea in pursuit of a brutal and secret criminal organization. He teams up again with Kang Jin Tae, who volunteers to work with the North Korean in order to get back on the investigation team after a mistake landed him in the cyber crime department.
overview_en: Follows Rim Chul-ryung heading back to South Korea in pursuit of a brutal and secret criminal organization. He teams up again with Kang Jin-tae, who volunteers to work with the North Korean in order to get back on the investigation team after a mistake landed him in the cyber crime department.

title_khmer: អវតារ : វិថីមហាសាគរ – Avatar: The Way of Water
overview: ដំណើរឿងនៃសង្គ្រាម ទន្ទ្រានរុករាន របស់មនុស្សផែនដីទៅលើភព ផេនដូរ៉ា ដែលយើងទាំងអស់សុទ្ធតែបានស្គាល់តាមរយៈសាច់រឿង ” AVATAR ” .
overview_en: Set more than a decade after the events of the first film, learn the story of the Sully family (Jake, Neytiri, and their kids), the trouble that follows them, the lengths they go to keep each other safe, the battles they fight to stay alive, and the tragedies they endure.

title_khmer: កាហ្វេ ឬ តែ ? Coffee Or Tea
overview: យុវជនបីនាក់មានគោលគំណិតខុសៗគ្នា តែបានសម្រេចក្តីស្រម៉ៃរួមគ្នាមួយនៅខេត្តយូណាន ព្រោះតែពួកគេមិនបោះបង់ចោលក្តីសង្ឃឹមរបស់ពួកគេ
overview_en: Three young men with very different personalities. When they leave the big city to return to the thousand-year-old village of Yunnan, they each begin a crazy and dream journey.

title_khmer: មីនុយមរណៈ – The Menu
overview: A young couple travels to a remote island to eat at an exclusive restaurant where the chef has prepared a lavish menu, with some shocking surprises.
overview_en: A young couple travels to a remote island to eat at an exclusive restaurant where the chef has prepared a lavish menu, with some shocking surprises.

title_khmer: ល្បែងមរណៈ X – Saw X
overview: ” ល្បែងមរណ:​ X ” លេងខុសមនុស្សហេីយ​ លេងប៉ះអ្នកណាមិនលេង​ មកលេងចំ​ Jig Saw បេីហ៊ានលូកដៃចូលល្បែងនេះហេីយត្រៀមតែខ្ទេចសាកសពឱ្យហេីយទៅ​ ,
overview_en: Between the events of 'Saw' and 'Saw II', a sick and desperate John Kramer travels to Mexico for a risky and experimental medical procedure in hopes of a miracle cure for his cancer, only to discover the entire operation is a scam to defraud the most vulnerable. Armed with a newfound purpose, the infamous serial killer returns to his work, turning the tables on the con artists in his signature visceral way through devious, deranged, and ingenious traps.

title_khmer: ដល់ពេលត្រូវសងសឹក – Remember
overview: រឿងរ៉ាវរបស់ Pil-Joo  ក្នុងវ័យ 80 ឆ្នាំ គាត់បានបាត់បង់គ្រួសារក្នុងសម័យអាណានិគមជប៉ុន, រឿងហេតុដ៏ឈឺចាប់របស់គាត់នៅក្នុង សម័យសង្គ្រាមនោះបានធ្វើឲ្យគាត់ ចងគំនំរង់ចាំការសងសឹកអស់រយៈពេល ៦០ឆ្នាំ
overview_en: With the aid of a fellow Auschwitz survivor and a hand-written letter, an elderly man with dementia goes in search of the person responsible for the death of his family.

title_khmer: ពេជ្ឈឃាដសាច់កម្មលើរថភ្លើង – Bullet Train
overview: ព្រោះតែវាលីមួយធ្វើឲ្យកំពូលឃាតកដ៏ជំនាញប៉ុន្មាននាក់ត្រូវជួបគ្នាលើរថភ្លើងល្បឿនលឿនទីក្រុងតូក្យូ,ឈុតឆាកប្រយុទ្ធកាប់សំលាប់ត្រូវបានផ្ទុះឡើងតាមសាច់រឿងនិងហេតុផលគោលដៅរបស់ឃាតករាងៗខ្លួន
overview_en: Unlucky assassin Ladybug is determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate, however, may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries from around the globe—all with connected, yet conflicting, objectives—on the world's fastest train.

title_khmer: កម្ទេចពិភពគ្មានមេត្តា – Boy Kills World
overview: ក្មេងប្រុសគថ្លង់ម្នាក់ត្រូវបានចាប់យកបង្ខាំងបង្វឹកឲ្យខ្លាចជាអាវុធដ៏សាហាវ ដើម្បីសំលាប់នឹងសងសឹកជូន បំណុលឈាមដែលម្តាយនិងប្អូនស្រីរបស់គេត្រូវបានសំលាប់យ៉ាងព្រៃផ្សៃ.
overview_en: When his family is murdered, a deaf-mute named Boy escapes to the jungle and is trained by a mysterious shaman to repress his childish imagination and become an instrument of death.

title_khmer: ឃាតកម្មថ្ងៃគ្រីស្គម៉ាស – Christmas Carol
overview: ព្រោះ តែការស្លាប់របស់ប្អូនគេ គេក៏បង្ករឿងដើម្បីចូល មណ្ឌលឃុំឃាំងអនីតិជនដោយខ្លួនឯង ដើម្បីសងសឹកចំពោះការស្លាប់របស់ប្អូនគេ
overview_en: A retelling of the classic Dickens tale of Ebenezer Scrooge, miser extraordinaire. He is held accountable for his dastardly ways during night-time visitations by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.

title_khmer: បេសកកម្មប្រម៉ាញ់គិញសម្ងាត់ – Hunt
overview: After a high-ranking North Korean official requests asylum, KCIA Foreign Unit chief Park Pyong-ho and Domestic Unit chief Kim Jung-do are tasked with uncovering a North Korean spy, known as Donglim, who is deeply embedded within their agency. When the spy begins leaking top secret intel that could jeopardize national security, the two units are each assigned to investigate each other.
overview_en: Twelve strangers wake up in a clearing. They don't know where they are—or how they got there. In the shadow of a dark internet conspiracy theory, ruthless elitists gather at a remote location to hunt humans for sport. But their master plan is about to be derailed when one of the hunted turns the tables on her pursuers.

title_khmer: កុងហ្វូផេនដា វគ្គ 4 – Kung Fu Panda 4
overview: ផូដែលជាអ្នកចម្បាំងនាគរាជ ត្រូវស្វែងរក អ្នកបន្តវេនអ្នកចម្បាំងនាគរាជថ្មី ដើម្បីការពារជ្រលងសន្តិភាព ខណៈពេលដែលធ្មប់អាក្រក់ឡាំដួយ គ្រោងនឹងកោះហៅមេអាក្រក់ទាំងអស់ដែល ផូ បានកម្ចាត់ មកពីឋានវិញ្ញាណឡើងវិញដើម្បីស្រូបវិជ្ជាគុណនិងប្រយុទ្ធដើម្បីចង់គ្រប់គ្រងពិភពគុន.
overview_en: Po is gearing up to become the spiritual leader of his Valley of Peace, but also needs someone to take his place as Dragon Warrior. As such, he will train a new kung fu practitioner for the spot and will encounter a villain called the Chameleon who conjures villains from the past.

title_khmer: Dune: សង្គ្រាមភពខ្សាច់ វគ្គ 2
title_english: Dune: សង្គ្រាមភពខ្សាច់ វគ្គ 2
overview: Paul Atreides ត្រូវចូលរួមជាមួយក្រុម Fremen ដើម្បីធ្វើការសងសឹកជូន បិតារបស់គេ និង សង្គ្រោះភព អារ៉ាឃីសទាំងមូល

title_khmer: ឧក្រិដ្ឋកម្ម​គ្រឿងញៀន​អនឡាញ – I Did It My Way
overview: ព្រោះតែភាពឈឺចាប់របស់ប្រពន្ធក៏បណ្តាលឲ្យ មេធាវីLin Zhen’an បានធ្វើការជួញដូរគ្រឿងញឿន មិនញញឹតដៃហើយក៏បានក្លាយជាមេក្លោងឈ្មួញគ្រឿងញៀនដ៏ធំនិងពូកែនៅលើបណ្តាញ Online តែទីបំផុតក៏ត្រូវក្រុមប៉ូលីសហុងកុង ធ្វើការបំបែកកូដនិងចាប់ភស្តុតាងបានព្រោះតែមានXiu Hao ដែលជាមិត្តរបស់ មេធាវី Lin Zhen’an នៅបង្កប់ខ្លួនក្បែរ Lin Zhen’an ។
overview_en: Ho Sau, an undercover agent, has been working with Yau, a drug lord, for years, but his job and family are in trouble.

title_khmer: បងម៉ាប់ដៃភ្លើងជើងមាន់ – Enter the Fat Dragon
overview: ប៉ូលិស​ម្នាក់​ត្រូវ​បាន​ចាត់​ឱ្យ​ជាប់​ពាក់ព័ន្ធ​នឹង​ករណី​នាំ​ឧក្រិដ្ឋជន​ទៅ​ប្រទេស​ជប៉ុន ខណៈ​ពេលដែល​កំពុង​ដោះស្រាយ​បញ្ហា​ទំនាក់​ទំនងស្នេហា និង​ការ​ផ្លាស់​ប្តូរ​រូបរាង​ដ៏​ធាត់សម្បើម​របស់​គាត់​ ជា​លទ្ធផល​ត្រូវមិត្តស្រីបោះបង់ចោល
overview_en: After being dumped by his fiancé, heartbroken Hong Kong police officer Fallon Zhu gains 200+ pounds. His superiors demote him to the job of escorting convicts to Japan. When a convict in his custody mysteriously dies, he must team up with citizen Thor to solve the mystery.

title_khmer: Dune : សង្គ្រាមភពខ្សាច់
title_english: Dune : សង្គ្រាមភពខ្សាច់
overview: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to the most dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet’s exclusive supply of the most precious resource in existence-a commodity capable of unlocking humanity’s greatest potential-only those who can conquer their fear will survive.

title_khmer: ក្រុមកំចាត់ខ្មោច : អាណាចក្រទឹកកក – Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
overview: ក្រុមកំចាត់ខ្មោចបានរកឃើញវត្ថុបុរាណមួយ , វត្ថុបុរាណនោះមានអនុភាពខ្លាំងខ្លាវឹសតែនេឹងធ្វើឲ្យពិភពលោកទាំងមូលក្លាយជាវិលទៅរកយុគសមួយទឹកកកជាលើកទី 2 តែពួកគេបានរួមគ្នាដើម្បីទប់ស្កាត់និងកំចាត់បិសាចកំណាចដែលចេញពីវត្ថុបុរាណនោះបានទាន់ពេលវេលា
overview_en: When the discovery of an ancient artifact unleashes an evil force, Ghostbusters new and old must join forces to protect their home and save the world from a second Ice Age.

title_khmer: កំចាត់ជនពាលនៅ Moscow
overview: ក្រុមប៉ូលីសចិន បានបន្តបេសកកម្មទៅកាន់ទីក្រុងមូស្គូ ដើម្បីតាមប្រមាញ់ក្រុមចោរប្លន់ដ៏ឃោរឃៅ ដែលបានវាយលុកផ្លូវរថភ្លើងឆ្លងស៊ីបេរី  ធ្វើឲ្យ ចលាចលពេញ ក្រុង មូស្គូ
overview_en: Tough Chinese detectives go on a mission to Moscow to hunt down ruthless robbers who have been plaguing the trans-Siberian railway with violence and chaos.

title_khmer: 6/45 រង្វាន់ឡូតូកូរពូទាហាន
title_english: 6/45 រង្វាន់ឡូតូកូរពូទាហាន
overview: បន្ទាប់​ពី​ការ​វាយ​ប្រហារ​ដ៏​ខ្លាំង​ក្លា​របស់​ពួក​គេ Godzilla និង Kong ត្រូវ​តែ​រួម​គ្នា​ប្រឆាំង​នឹង​ការ​គំរាម​កំហែង​ដែល​មិន​អាច​រក​ឃើញ​ដ៏​ធំ​សម្បើម​ដែល​លាក់​ខ្លួន​ក្នុង​ពិភព​លោក​យើង ដោយ​ប្រឈម​នឹង​អត្ថិភាព​របស់​ពួក​វា និង​របស់​យើង​ផ្ទាល់។

title_khmer: Godzilla x Kong: ចក្រភពអាថ៍កំបាំង
title_english: Godzilla x Kong: ចក្រភពអាថ៍កំបាំង
overview: បន្ទាប់ពីរួមដៃគ្នាប្រយុទ្ធដ៏ខ្លាំងខ្លារវៀង Godzilla និង Kong ពួកគេក៏បានវិលត្រឡប់រួមគ្នាម្តងទៀត ដើម្បីប្រយុទ្ធ ជាមួយនឹង​ ​សត្វយក្សខ្លាំងខ្លាដែលបានរកឃើញពី ចក្រភពអាថ៍កំបាំងមួយក្នុងប្រហោងផែនដី

title_khmer: ផ្ទះខ្មោចតៃហោង – Contorted
overview: ក្រោយពីគ្រួសារមួយបានផ្លាស់ទីលំនៅទៅកាន់ផ្ទះថ្មី រឿងហេតុអាក្រក់ជាច្រើនបានកើតឡើងមកលើពួកគេ
overview_en: A family moves to a quiet and isolated place, but suffers from nightmares on their very first day in the new home.

title_khmer: ផ្នូរបិសាច – Exhuma
overview: ផ្នូរដូនតារបស់គ្រួសារមួយត្រូវបានធ្វើពិធីដើម្បីគាស់ផ្លាស់ប្តូរទីតាំង ,ក្រោយពេលគាស់ផ្នូរនោះឡើង រឿងចម្លែកៗគ្រោះថ្នាក់ដ៏សាហាវជាច្រើនក៏កើតមានជាបន្តបន្ទាប់ ព្រោះនោះមិនមែនជាផ្នូរដូនតាធម្មតានោះឡើយ។
overview_en: After tracing the origin of a disturbing supernatural affliction to a wealthy family's ancestral gravesite, a team of paranormal experts relocates the remains—and soon discovers what happens to those who dare to mess with the wrong grave.

title_khmer: មហន្តរាយធ្លាក់យន្តហោះ – Plane
overview: យន្តហោះដឹកអ្នកដំណើរមួយគ្រឿងត្រូវបានបង្ខំចិត្តចុះចតកណ្តាលព្រៃ ក្នុងតំបន់គ្រោះថ្នាក់ ព្រោះតែអំឡុងពេលហោះហើរ បានជួបឧប្បត្តិហេតុ ព្យុះនិងរន្ទះបណ្តាលឲ្យយន្តហោះខូចបាត់ការគ្រប់គ្រង និង បង្កឲ្យមានគ្រោះមហន្តរាយដ៏សែនសង្វែក។
overview_en: An exotic animal turns into a monster and becomes a deadly danger for all passengers.

title_khmer: គ្រាប់បែកសំឡេងបំបែកក្រុង – Decibel
overview: នៅពីក្រោយអាថ៍កំបាំងនៃសាច់រឿងទាំងអស់ នឹងត្រូវបានបងបង្ហាញក្រពេលគ្រាប់បែកសំឡេង បំផ្ទុះបំបែកក្រុង
overview_en: A former Naval officer with a dark past must face off against an insurgent with a sound sensitive bomb.

title_khmer: កម្ទេចវូងឃ្មុំ – The Beekeeper
overview: អំពើឆបោកក្នុងសង្គមបានធ្វើឲ្យស្ត្រីចំណាស់ម្នាក់ស្លាប់ដោយការធ្វើអត្តឃាត , បក្សពួកក្រុមបោកសុទ្ធតែខ្សែអ្នកនយោបាយដែលមានបណ្តាញពុករលួយបង្កភាពវឹកវរក្នុងសង្គម ក៏បណ្តាលឲ្យបុរសម្នាក់ចេញ លេចមុខមកកម្ទេចក្រុមបោកនិងក្រុមអ្នកនយោបាយពុករលួយទាំងនោះដែលគេហៅថា ” អ្នកចិញ្ចឹមឃ្មុំ”
overview_en: One man's campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after he is revealed to be a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organization known as Beekeepers.

title_khmer: Argylle កំពូលភ្នាក់ងារក្នុងក្តីស្រម៉ៃ
title_english: Argylle កំពូលភ្នាក់ងារក្នុងក្តីស្រម៉ៃ
overview: ប្រលោមលោកចារកម្មមួយត្រូវបានសរសេរផុសចេញជារឿងពិត ធ្វើឲ្យគ្រប់គ្នាតាមប្រយុទ្ធគ្នាដើម្បីតែដណ្តើមវគ្គចុងក្រោយនៃសាច់រឿងចារកម្មនោះ ដែលសរសេរដោយ Elly Coway .

title_khmer: ទេវបុត្រដៃឆៅ – The Childe
overview: បុរសម្នាក់ដែលកំព្រាឪពុក បានព្យាយាមរកលុយដើម្បីមើលជំងឺម្តាយ នៅប្រទេសហ្វីលីពីន ស្រាប់តែ គេទទួលដំណឹងត្រូវឡើងទៅប្រទេសកូរ៉េ ដើម្បីជួបឪពុកបង្កើតរបស់គេ  , ស្របពេលការបង្ហាញខ្លួនរបស់គេពេលទៅដល់កូរ៉េ អាថ៍កំបាំងជាច្រើនត្រូវបានបង្ហាញ ព្រមជាមួយនឹងគ្រោះថ្នាក់ជាច្រើនផងដែរ ដែលគេនឹកស្មានមិនដល់
overview_en: Han, a Filipino-Korean boxer hits the final punch against his opponent at an illegal game and returns home with a few dollars to pay for his mother's surgery.

title_khmer: វីរបុរសរ៉ោករ៉ាកទាំង6 – Big Hero 6
overview: ក្រុមយុវជនមួយក្រុមបានរួមគ្នាបង្កើតបច្ចេកវិជ្ជាទំនើបមួយក្នុងចំណោមពួកគេមានក្មេងប្រុសម្នាក់ឈ្មោះ Hiro ដែលមានជំនាញខ្លាំងជាងគេក្នុងការបង្កើតសម្ថភាពរបស់ មនុស្សយន្តឈ្មោះ Baymax ដែលជាមនុស្សយន្តដែលបន្សល់ទុកពីបងប្រុសគេ , ពួកគេក៏ អភិវឌ្ឈន៍បច្ចេកវិជ្ជារបស់ខ្លួនដើម្បីប្រយុទ្ធ កាពារទីក្រុង ពីជនរបាំងមុខ ដែលជាជនអាក្រក់។
overview_en: A special bond develops between plus-sized inflatable robot Baymax, and prodigy Hiro Hamada, who team up with a group of friends to form a band of high-tech heroes.

title_khmer: Before I Go to Sleep
overview: Ever since she sustained a traumatic head injury, Christine Lucas has suffered from anterograde amnesia, unable to form new memories and having forgotten the last 15 years of her life. Every morning, she becomes reacquainted with her husband, Ben, and the other constants in her life. Terrifying truths about her past begin to emerge, causing her to question everything — and everyone — around her.
overview_en: A woman wakes up every day, remembering nothing as a result of a traumatic accident in her past. One day, new terrifying truths emerge that force her to question everyone around her.

title_khmer: ពូម៉ាប់ប្រម៉ាញ់ដែនបិសាច – Badland Hunters
overview: After a deadly earthquake turns Seoul into a lawless badland, a fearless huntsman springs into action to rescue a teenager abducted by a mad doctor.
overview_en: After a deadly earthquake turns Seoul into a lawless badland, a fearless huntsman springs into action to rescue a teenager abducted by a mad doctor.

title_khmer: បេសកកម្មកម្ទេចមេគ្រឿងញៀន – The White Storm 3: Heaven or Hell
title_english: The White Storm 3: Heaven or Hell
overview: ភ្នាក់ងារប៉ូលីសហុងកុង បានបង្កប់ខ្លួននៅក្នុងក្រុមជួញដូរគ្រឿងញៀន, ពួកគេស្ទើតែលះបង់ជីវិត ក្នុងការតាមបង្ក្រាបក្រុមជួញដូរគ្រឿងញៀន​និងកម្ទេចសំបុកមេគ្រឿងញៀននៅតំបន់ត្រីកោណមាស
overview_en: An undercover cop who invade a drug cartel led by a notorious Thai drug lord. In classic heroic bloodshed fashion, the two develop a bond of brotherhood.

title_khmer: លូកា – Luca
overview: Luca and his best friend Alberto experience an unforgettable summer on the Italian Riviera. But all the fun is threatened by a deeply-held secret: they are sea monsters from another world just below the water’s surface.
overview_en: Luca and his best friend Alberto experience an unforgettable summer on the Italian Riviera. But all the fun is threatened by a deeply-held secret: they are sea monsters from another world just below the water’s surface.

title_khmer: គេចពីនរក – Hopeless
overview: Yeon-gyu ក្មេងប្រុសជំទង់ម្នាក់ដែលតែង​សង្ឃឹម​ថា​នឹង​មាន​ជីវិត​ដ៏​សុខសាន្ត​ជាមួយ​ម្តាយ​របស់គេ តែទោះជាយ៉ាងណា ពិភពលោកមិនដែលអនុញ្ញាតឱ្យគេសម្រេចក្តីសង្ឃឹមសម្រាប់ជីវិតឡើយ ជីវិតដែលមានតែភាពទុក្ខសោកក្នុងគ្រួសារដែលផ្តល់ដោយឪពុកចុង, គេផុងខ្លួនចូលក្នុងក្រុមជនអតិពាលព្រោះតែកត្តាសង្គមនិងគ្រួសារ ជីវិតគេធ្លាក់ចូលអបាយមុខកាន់តែជ្រៅបីដូចចូលនរក ទោះគេខំព្យាយាមគេចនិងចាកចេញពីសង្គមដ៏ខ្មៅងងឹតយ៉ាងណាក៏ជីវិតគេក៏មានតែភាពអួអាប់ , តើគេអាចគេចពីនរកនេះផុតទេ?
overview_en: Yeon-gyu is a teenage boy who wants to escape his hometown where violence is commonly enacted among neighbors. He only hopes to have a peaceful life with his mother. However, the world never allows him to have a dream nor hope for life. When Yeon-gyu needs a hand from grown-ups, Chi-geon, a thug of the town, offers a favor. The simple favor leads Yeon-gyu to explore the world of Chi-geon. It ironically results Yeon-gyu gradually falling into Chi-geon's life. Grasping hope to run away from where he is, he struggles between the border. Can he escape from the town at the end?

title_khmer: ប្រតិកម្មស្នេហ៍ 30 ថ្ងៃ – Love Rest
overview: ប្តីប្រពន្ធមួយគូដោយរស់មិនចុះសម្រុងនឹងគ្នាបន្ទាប់ពីរៀបការហើយ ក៏សម្រេចចិត្តធ្វើការលែងលះ , បន្ទាប់ពីតុលាកាសម្រេចទុកពេល 30 ថ្ងៃសម្រាប់ការកំណត់នៃការលែងលះ គេទាំងពីរក៏ចួបឧបត្តិហេតុ គ្រោះថ្នាក់ បណ្តាលឱ្យបាត់ការចងចាំទាំងពីរនាក់ ហើយដំណើរឿងស្នេហាប្រទាក់ក្រឡារបស់គេទាំងពីរ ក៏បានផ្លែផ្កា ក្នុងអំឡុងពេល 30 ថ្ងៃ នៃការបាត់ការចងចាំនោះ ។​
overview_en: A tragic love story between a prostitute and a young trainee monk.

title_khmer: ក្សត្រាសាគរនិងអាណាចក្រដែលបាត់បង់ – Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
overview: Black Manta ត្រឡប់មកធ្វើការសងសឹកមកលើ Aquaman ចំពោះការស្លាប់របស់ឪពុកគេ។  ដោយអំណាចលកំពែងខ្មៅ Black Trident បានធ្វើឲ្យគេកាន់តែខ្លាំងជាងមុន ,  ដើម្បីការពារ Atlantis Aquaman បង្កើតសម្ព័ន្ធភាពជាមួយប្អូនប្រុសរបស់គេ ពួកគេ
overview_en: Black Manta seeks revenge on Aquaman for his father's death. Wielding the Black Trident's power, he becomes a formidable foe. To defend Atlantis, Arthur (Aquaman) forges an alliance with his imprisoned brother. They must protect the kingdom.

title_khmer: Wonka ស្តេចសូកូឡា
title_english: Wonka ស្តេចសូកូឡា
overview: Willy Wonka – chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one delectable bite at a time – is proof that the best things in life begin with a dream, and if you’re lucky enough to meet Willy Wonka, anything is possible.

title_khmer: Spider-Man: No Way Home
overview: Peter Parker is unmasked and no longer able to separate his normal life from the high-stakes of being a super-hero. When he asks for help from Doctor Strange the stakes become even more dangerous, forcing him to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.
overview_en: Peter Parker is unmasked and no longer able to separate his normal life from the high-stakes of being a super-hero. When he asks for help from Doctor Strange the stakes become even more dangerous, forcing him to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

title_khmer: Blue Beetle
overview: Recent college grad Jaime Reyes returns home full of aspirations for his future, only to find that home is not quite as he left it. As he searches to find his purpose in the world, fate intervenes when Jaime unexpectedly finds himself in possession of an ancient relic of alien biotechnology: the Scarab.
overview_en: Recent college grad Jaime Reyes returns home full of aspirations for his future, only to find that home is not quite as he left it. As he searches to find his purpose in the world, fate intervenes when Jaime unexpectedly finds himself in possession of an ancient relic of alien biotechnology: the Scarab.

title_khmer: X-Men: Apocalypse
overview: After the re-emergence of the world’s first mutant, world-destroyer Apocalypse, the X-Men must unite to defeat his extinction level plan.
overview_en: After the re-emergence of the world's first mutant, world-destroyer Apocalypse, the X-Men must unite to defeat his extinction level plan.

title_khmer: The Flash
overview: When his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, Barry Allen becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned and there are no Super Heroes to turn to. In order to save the world that he is in and return to the future that he knows, Barry’s only hope is to race for his life. But will making the ultimate sacrifice be enough to reset the universe?
overview_en: When his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, Barry Allen becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned and there are no Super Heroes to turn to. In order to save the world that he is in and return to the future that he knows, Barry's only hope is to race for his life. But will making the ultimate sacrifice be enough to reset the universe?

title_khmer: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings
title_english: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings
overview: Shang-Chi must confront the past he thought he left behind when he is drawn into the web of the mysterious Ten Rings organization.
overview_en: Shang-Chi must confront the past he thought he left behind when he is drawn into the web of the mysterious Ten Rings organization.

title_khmer: Mummies
overview: Through a series of unfortunate events, three mummies end up in present-day London and embark on a wacky and hilarious journey in search of an old ring belonging to the Royal Family, stolen by ambitious archaeologist Lord Carnaby.
overview_en: Through a series of unfortunate events, three mummies end up in present-day London and embark on a wacky and hilarious journey in search of an old ring belonging to the Royal Family, stolen by ambitious archaeologist Lord Carnaby.

title_khmer: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
title_english: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
overview: Doctor Strange, with the help of mystical allies both old and new, traverses the mind-bending and dangerous alternate realities of the Multiverse to confront a mysterious new adversary.
overview_en: Doctor Strange, with the help of mystical allies both old and new, traverses the mind-bending and dangerous alternate realities of the Multiverse to confront a mysterious new adversary.

title_khmer: Venom
overview: Investigative journalist Eddie Brock attempts a comeback following a scandal, but accidentally becomes the host of Venom, a violent, super powerful alien symbiote. Soon, he must rely on his newfound powers to protect the world from a shadowy organization looking for a symbiote of their own.
overview_en: Investigative journalist Eddie Brock attempts a comeback following a scandal, but accidentally becomes the host of Venom, a violent, super powerful alien symbiote. Soon, he must rely on his newfound powers to protect the world from a shadowy organization looking for a symbiote of their own.

title_khmer: Morbius
overview: Dangerously ill with a rare blood disorder, and determined to save others suffering his same fate, Dr. Michael Morbius attempts a desperate gamble. What at first appears to be a radical success soon reveals itself to be a remedy potentially worse than the disease.
overview_en: Dangerously ill with a rare blood disorder, and determined to save others suffering his same fate, Dr. Michael Morbius attempts a desperate gamble. What at first appears to be a radical success soon reveals itself to be a remedy potentially worse than the disease.

title_khmer: ភ្លើងគំនុំ – Ragging Fire
overview: Cheung Sung-bong is a highly respected cop with a long history of success in dangerous cases. However, his past soon comes back to haunt him when a former protégé resurfaces, seeking revenge.

title_khmer: ទីក្រុងឧក្រិដ្ធ : គ្មានច្រកចេញ – The Roundup: No Way Out
overview: Detective Ma Seok-do changes his affiliation from the Geumcheon Police Station to the Metropolitan Investigation Team, in order to eradicate Japanese gangsters who enter Korea to commit heinous crimes.
overview_en: Detective Ma Seok-do changes his affiliation from the Geumcheon Police Station to the Metropolitan Investigation Team, in order to eradicate Japanese gangsters who enter Korea to commit heinous crimes.

title_khmer: តស់! ទៅផ្ទះ – Come Back Home
overview: A young boy, Lele, goes missing in the Changbai mountains after an argument with this father. Approaching the vital 48 hour mark and with no sign of Lele, his father takes it upon himself to brave an upcoming avalanche to save his son

title_khmer: អាក្រហមកូនឪ – Ride On
overview: A washed-up stuntman and his stunt horse become an overnight social media sensation when their real-life fight with debt collectors goes viral.
overview_en: A washed-up stuntman and his stunt horse become an overnight social media sensation when their real-life fight with debt collectors goes viral.

title_khmer: ភពក្រឡាប់ចាក់ – Switch
overview: A story of how Park Kang’s life is changed on Christmas day. Park Kang is a popular actor, but he is also a scandal maker. His manager is Jo Yoon and they are also long-time friends. One day, Park Kang’s ex-girlfriend Soo-hyun suddenly appears in front of Park Kang.
overview_en: A story of how Park Kang's life is changed on Christmas day.  Park Kang is a popular actor, but he is also a scandal maker. His manager is Jo Yoon and they are also long-time friends. One day, Park Kang's ex-girlfriend Soo-hyun suddenly appears in front of Park Kang.

title_khmer: ស្មារតីតស៊ូស្តេចឡកម៉ុងសាយ – I Am What I Am
overview: By a fortunate coincidence, Juan is inspired and encouraged by a girl with the same name. Therefore, he decides to form a lion dance troupe with his friends, Cat and Dog, to break the constraints of reality and fight for themselves for once..
overview_en: By a fortunate coincidence, Gyun is inspired and encouraged by a girl with the same name. Therefore, he decides to form a lion dance troupe with his friends, Kat and Doggie, to break the constraints of reality and fight for themselves for once.

title_khmer: ព្រះនាងស្បែកជើងក្រហម – Red Shoes and the Seven Dwarfs
title_english: Red Shoes and the Seven Dwarfs
overview: Princes who have been turned into Dwarfs seek the red shoes of a lady in order to break the spell, although it will not be easy.
overview_en: Princes who have been turned into Dwarfs seek the red shoes of a lady in order to break the spell, although it will not be easy.

title_khmer: អ្នកម្នាងសតវត្សរ៍ទី២១ – Perfect Crown
overview: នៅក្នុងរបបរាជានិយមនៃសតវត្សទី២១ ស្ត្រីម្នាក់ដែលមានគ្រប់យ៉ាងតែនៅត្រឹមជាសាមញ្ញជន បានជួបជាមួយព្រះអង្គម្ចាស់មួយអង្គ ដែលទោះបីជាមានខ្សែលោហិតក្សត្រ ប៉ុន្តែបែរជាមានអារម្មណ៍ថាគ្មានអំណាចនៅក្នុងដៃ—នាំឱ្យកើតមាននូវក្តីស្រឡាញ់មួយ ដែលហ៊ានជម្នះនឹងរបាំងឋានៈសង្គម។
overview_en: In a 21st-century constitutional monarchy, a woman who has everything but remains a commoner crosses paths with a prince who, despite his royal lineage, feels powerless—leading to a love that defies social status.

title_khmer: ខ្សែជីវិតសារ៉ា – The Art of Sarah
overview: សាកសពមួយត្រូវបានគេប្រទះឃើញនៅកណ្តាលទីក្រុង។ ម៉ាកយីហោដ៏ប្រណីតមួយកំពុងតែមានឈ្មោះបោះសំឡេង។ អ្នកស៊ើបអង្កេតម្នាក់បានស៊ើបអង្កេតយ៉ាងល្អិតល្អន់គ្រប់ចំណុចនៃសាច់រឿងរបស់ស្ត្រីម្នាក់ ដែលចេះតែផ្លាស់ប្ដូរមិនឈប់ឈរ។ តើមានរឿងអ្វីកើតឡើងឲ្យពិតប្រាកដទៅ?
overview_en: A body found in the middle of town. A luxe label on the rise. A detective tests every stitch of a woman's story that keeps changing. What really happened?

title_khmer: ក្រុមអ្នកលេង ភីកគី ព’ឡាញដឺ Peaky Blinders
overview: A gangster family epic set in 1919 Birmingham, England and centered on a gang who sew razor blades in the peaks of their caps, and their fierce boss Tommy Shelby, who means to move up in the world.
overview_en: A gangster family epic set in 1919 Birmingham, England and centered on a gang who sew razor blades in the peaks of their caps, and their fierce boss Tommy Shelby, who means to move up in the world.

title_khmer: បញ្ជីមរណៈ – Death Note
overview: Light Yagami គឺជាសិស្សឆ្នើមម្នាក់ ប៉ុន្តែរូបគេបែរជាមានអារម្មណ៍ធុញទ្រាន់នឹងជីវិតដែលដដែលៗជាខ្លាំង។ ក៏ប៉ុន្តែ គ្រប់យ៉ាងត្រូវបានផ្លាស់ប្តូរទាំងស្រុង នៅពេលដែលគេបានរើសបាន “Death Note” ដែលជាសៀវភៅកំណត់ហេតុរបស់ទេវបុត្រមច្ចុរាជ (Shinigami) ម្នាក់ដែលបានទម្លាក់មកលើលោកកិយ។
overview_en: Light Yagami is an ace student with great prospects—and he’s bored out of his mind. But all that changes when he finds the Death Note, a notebook dropped by a rogue Shinigami death god. Any human whose name is written in the notebook dies, and Light has vowed to use the power of the Death Note to rid the world of evil. But will Light succeed in his noble goal, or will the Death Note turn him into the very thing he fights against?

title_khmer: អ្នកក្លាហានវិទ្យាល័យ – ONE: High School Heroes
overview: A former model student, pushed by domestic abuse and bullying, joins a group that stands up to school violence and defends its victims.
overview_en: A former model student, pushed by domestic abuse and bullying, joins a group that stands up to school violence and defends its victims.

title_khmer: អ្នកប្រមាញ់បិសាច – Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba
overview: After a demon attack leaves his family slain and his sister cursed, Tanjiro embarks upon a perilous journey to find a cure and avenge those he’s lost.
overview_en: After a demon attack leaves his family slain and his sister cursed, Tanjiro embarks upon a perilous journey to find a cure and avenge those he's lost.

title_khmer: កំណប់ស្តេចចោរ – ONE PIECE
overview: With his straw hat and ragtag crew, young pirate Monkey D. Luffy goes on an epic voyage for treasure.
overview_en: With his straw hat and ragtag crew, young pirate Monkey D. Luffy goes on an epic voyage for treasure.

title_khmer: សត្វចម្លែកឋានបញ្ច្រាស់ Stranger Things
overview: When a young boy vanishes, a small town uncovers a mystery involving secret experiments, terrifying supernatural forces, and one strange little girl.
overview_en: When a young boy vanishes, a small town uncovers a mystery involving secret experiments, terrifying supernatural forces, and one strange little girl.

title_khmer: ស្តេចសាមូរ៉ៃចុងក្រោយ – Last Samurai Standing
overview: In the early Meiji era, Shujiro, once known as an undefeated samurai, decides to participate in a deadly survival game to save his family and villagers.
overview_en: In the early Meiji era, Shujiro, once known as an undefeated samurai, decides to participate in a deadly survival game to save his family and villagers.

title_khmer: ម្ចាស់ក្សត្រីជឿជាក់ – Confidence Queen
overview: Three con artists with different backgrounds, team up for a daring and adventurous scheme of revenge against the villains of this era.
overview_en: Three con artists with different backgrounds, team up for a daring and adventurous scheme of revenge against the villains of this era.
