title_khmer: បំបែកសំណុំបិសាចឆ្លងភព – Yu Yu Hakusho
overview: After a selfless act costs him his life, teen delinquent Yusuke Urameshi is chosen as a Spirit Detective to investigate cases involving rogue yokai.
overview_en: After dying to save a boy, delinquent tough guy Yusuke Urameshi is granted another chance at life by redeeming himself as a "Spirit Detective."

title_khmer: វីរបុរសលុយសុទ្ធ – Cashero
overview: An ordinary man who inherits super strength discovers a greater evil out to steal his power. The one catch? Every use drains money from his wallet.
overview_en: An ordinary man who inherits super strength discovers a greater evil out to steal his power. The one catch? Every use drains money from his wallet.

title_khmer: សាមូរ៉ៃភ្នែកខៀវ – BLUE EYE SAMURAI
overview: Driven by a dream of revenge against those who made her an outcast in Edo-period Japan, a young warrior cuts a bloody path toward her destiny.
overview_en: Driven by a dream of revenge against those who made her an outcast in Edo-period Japan, a young warrior cuts a bloody path toward her destiny.

title_khmer: យុវវ័យរបស់ខ្ញុំ – My Youth
overview: The story of Sun Woo-hae and Sung Je-yun, who reunite after 15 years, struggling and living fiercely in their respective stages.
overview_en: The story of Sun Woo-hae and Sung Je-yun, who reunite after 15 years, struggling and living fiercely in their respective stages.

title_khmer: ម៉ាវ៉ល ហ្សមប៊ី – Marvel Zombies
overview: After the Avengers are overtaken by a zombie plague, a desperate group of survivors discover the key to bringing an end to the super-powered undead, racing across a dystopian landscape and risking life and limb to save their world.
overview_en: After the Avengers are overtaken by a zombie plague, a desperate group of survivors discover the key to bringing an end to the super-powered undead, racing across a dystopian landscape and risking life and limb to save their world.

title_khmer: សង្គ្រាមវេទមន្ត – JUJUTSU KAISEN
overview: Yuji Itadori is a boy with tremendous physical strength, though he lives a completely ordinary high school life. One day, to save a classmate who has been attacked by curses, he eats the finger of Ryomen Sukuna, taking the curse into his own soul. From then on, he shares one body with Ryomen Sukuna. Guided by the most powerful of sorcerers, Satoru Gojo, Itadori is admitted to Tokyo Jujutsu High School, an organization that fights the curses… and thus begins the heroic tale of a boy who became a curse to exorcise a curse, a life from which he could never turn back.
overview_en: Yuji Itadori is a boy with tremendous physical strength, though he lives a completely ordinary high school life. One day, to save a classmate who has been attacked by curses, he eats the finger of Ryomen Sukuna, taking the curse into his own soul. From then on, he shares one body with Ryomen Sukuna. Guided by the most powerful of sorcerers, Satoru Gojo, Itadori is admitted to Tokyo Jujutsu High School, an organization that fights the curses... and thus begins the heroic tale of a boy who became a curse to exorcise a curse, a life from which he could never turn back.

title_khmer: ល្បែងផ្គុំរូប – Nine Puzzles
overview: Ten years after discovering her murdered uncle, Ena and Detective Hansaem must cooperate to stop a series of similar murders – each linked by strange puzzle pieces.
overview_en: Ten years after discovering her murdered uncle, Ena and Detective Hansaem must cooperate to stop a series of similar murders - each linked by strange puzzle pieces.

title_khmer: សុំប្រាថ្នាទៅណា ចាហ្វាយ ! Genie, Make a Wish
overview: After a thousand years, a quirky genie returns to grant wishes to a woman born without feelings. Can his magic bring love and wonder to her world?
overview_en: After a thousand years, a quirky genie returns to grant wishes to a woman born without feelings. Can his magic bring love and wonder to her world?

title_khmer: ព្យុះផ្កាយខាងជើង – Tempest
overview: Seo Munju,  ជាអតីតឯកអគ្គរដ្ឋទូតប្រចាំអង្គការសហប្រជាជាតិ និង Sanho ជាអ្នកជំនាញភារកិច្ចពិសេសអន្តរជាតិបានប្រជែងគ្នាដើម្បីបើកបង្ហាញសេចក្ដីពិតពីការវាយប្រហារមួយ ដែលគំរាមកំហែងដល់ស្ថិរភាពនាពេលអនាគតនៃប្រជាធិបតេយ្យកូរ៉េ។
overview_en: Seo Munju, a highly accomplished diplomat and former ambassador to the United Nations, and Sanho, an international special agent shrouded in a veil of secrets, race to uncover the truth behind an attack that threatens the future stability of the Korean peninsula.

title_khmer: មនុស្សក្បាលរណារ – Chainsaw Man
overview: Denji has a simple dream—to live a happy and peaceful life, spending time with a girl he likes. This is a far cry from reality, however, as Denji is forced by the yakuza into killing devils in order to pay off his crushing debts. Using his pet devil Pochita as a weapon, he is ready to do anything for a bit of cash.
overview_en: Denji has a simple dream—to live a happy and peaceful life, spending time with a girl he likes. This is a far cry from reality, however, as Denji is forced by the yakuza into killing devils in order to pay off his crushing debts. Using his pet devil Pochita as a weapon, he is ready to do anything for a bit of cash.

title_khmer: កម្មអាក្រក់ Karma
overview: A fateful accident intertwines six lives in a thrilling tale of karma and crime, where each must face their own dark truths and connections.
overview_en: A fateful accident intertwines six lives in a thrilling tale of karma and crime, where each must face their own dark truths and connections.

title_khmer: ហ្សីពុធ – Wednesday
overview: Wednesday Addams is sent to Nevermore Academy, a bizarre boarding school where she attempts to master her psychic powers, stop a monstrous killing spree of the town citizens, and solve the supernatural mystery that affected her family 25 years ago — all while navigating her new relationships.
overview_en: Smart, sarcastic and a little dead inside, Wednesday Addams investigates twisted mysteries while making new friends — and foes — at Nevermore Academy.

title_khmer: ចុងភៅស្តេចផ្តាច់ការ – Bon Appétit, Your Majesty
overview: After time traveling to the Joseon era, a talented chef meets a tyrant king. Her modern dishes captivate his palate, but royal challenges await her.
overview_en: After time traveling to the Joseon era, a talented chef meets a tyrant king. Her modern dishes captivate his palate, but royal challenges await her.

title_khmer: ទេវតាឆ្នាំទាំង១២ – Twelve
overview: A group of heroes, each embodying one of the 12 zodiac signs, battles to defend the Korean Peninsula from malevolent spirits.
overview_en: The story of 12 ordinary Australians who are selected for jury duty in a murder trial as traumatising as it is controversial, in which a woman stands accused of killing her teenage niece.

title_khmer: បន្ទាត់ក្រហម – S Line
overview: The show will present of a cryptic red line that appears over head of the people in the show.
overview_en: Four panelists must determine guests' occupations - and, in the case of famous guests, while blindfolded, their identity - by asking only "yes" or "no" questions.

title_khmer: អាលីសក្នុងទឹកដីនៃសេចក្តីស្លាប់ Alice in Borderland
overview: With his two friends, a video-game-obsessed young man finds himself in a strange version of Tokyo where they must compete in dangerous games to win.
overview_en: With his two friends, a video-game-obsessed young man finds himself in a strange version of Tokyo where they must compete in dangerous games to win.

title_khmer: ហ្គេមមឹក – Squid Game
overview: មនុស្សដែលមានបំណុលវ័នករ រាប់រយនាក់ត្រូវបានទួលយកការអញ្ជើញដ៏ចម្លែកមួយដើម្បីមកប្រកួតប្រជែងលេងក្នុងហ្គេមរបស់កុមារ ដែលមានរង្វាន់ជាលុយរាប់សឹបលាននឹងទទួលបានបើសិនជាឈ្នះ ហើយក៏ត្រូវអស់ជីវិតបើសិនជាចាញ់។
overview_en: Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a strange invitation to compete in children's games. Inside, a tempting prize awaits — with deadly high stakes.

title_khmer: គំនុំឈាមមិនអាចលើកលែង – Mercy for None
overview: After severing ties with his gang, a former gangster returns to uncover the truth behind his brother’s death — embarking on a relentless path of revenge.
overview_en: After severing ties with his gang, a former gangster returns to uncover the truth behind his brother's death — embarking on a relentless path of revenge.

title_khmer: សង្គ្រាមប្រល័យយក្ស : ថ្នាក់ដំបូង – Attack on Titan: Junior High
overview: Your favorite characters from Attack on Titan are back in…junior high school? Adapted from the hit spinoff manga series—Attack on Titan: Junior High (written by Saki Nakagawa), this parody reimagines Eren, Mikasa, Armin, and other characters from the original manga as students and teachers at Titan Junior High School.
overview_en: Your favorite characters from Attack on Titan are back in…junior high school? Adapted from the hit spinoff manga series—Attack on Titan: Junior High (written by Saki Nakagawa), this parody reimagines Eren, Mikasa, Armin, and other characters from the original manga as students and teachers at Titan Junior High School.

title_khmer: បេសកកម្មគ្រួសារអាថ៍កំបាំង – SPY x FAMILY
overview: World peace is at stake and secret agent Twilight must undergo his most difficult mission yet—pretend to be a family man. Posing as a loving husband and father, he’ll infiltrate an elite school to get close to a high-profile politician. He has the perfect cover, except his wife’s a deadly assassin and neither knows each other’s identity. But someone does: his adopted daughter, who’s a telepath !
overview_en: A spy, an assassin and a telepath come together to pose as a family, each for their own reasons, while hiding their true identities from each other.

title_khmer: អ្នកប្រមាញ់​ច្រកទ្វានរក – Solo Leveling
overview: They say whatever doesn’t kill you makes you stronger, but that’s not the case for the world’s weakest hunter Sung Jinwoo. After being brutally slaughtered by monsters in a high-ranking dungeon, Jinwoo came back with the System, a program only he could see, that’s leveling him up in every way. Now, he’s inspired to discover the secrets behind his powers and the dungeon that spawned them.
overview_en: They say whatever doesn’t kill you makes you stronger, but that’s not the case for the world’s weakest hunter Sung Jinwoo. After being brutally slaughtered by monsters in a high-ranking dungeon, Jinwoo came back with the System, a program only he could see, that’s leveling him up in every way. Now, he’s inspired to discover the secrets behind his powers and the dungeon that spawned them.

title_khmer: អវសានពិភពលោក – The Last of Us
overview: Twenty years after modern civilization has been destroyed, Joel, a hardened survivor, is hired to smuggle Ellie, a 14-year-old girl, out of an oppressive quarantine zone. What starts as a small job soon becomes a brutal, heartbreaking journey, as they both must traverse the United States and depend on each other for survival .
overview_en: Twenty years after modern civilization has been destroyed, Joel, a hardened survivor, is hired to smuggle Ellie, a 14-year-old girl, out of an oppressive quarantine zone. What starts as a small job soon becomes a brutal, heartbreaking journey, as they both must traverse the United States and depend on each other for survival.

title_khmer: វេជ្ជបណ្ឌិតបិសាច – Hyper Knife
overview: Seok, an eager yet genius neurosurgeon is reunited with Deokhee, the professor who ruined her life long ago. Once, the two surgeons cared for each other more than anyone else. But now with nothing but hatred toward each other, Seok is furious that he is back in her life and vows to take revenge.
overview_en: Seok, an eager yet genius neurosurgeon is reunited with Deokhee, the professor who ruined her life long ago. Once, the two surgeons cared for each other more than anyone else. But now with nothing but hatred toward each other, Seok is furious that he is back in her life and vows to take revenge.

title_khmer: មណ្ឌលឃាតក – A Shop for Killers
overview: A niece who lost her parents and grew up in the hands of an uncle who runs a shopping mall faces a new truth after her uncle’s sudden death.
overview_en: A niece who lost her parents and grew up in the hands of an uncle who runs a shopping mall faces a new truth after her uncle's sudden death.

title_khmer: ជីវិតស្រស់បំព្រងក្រោយចួបបង – When Life Gives You Tangerines
overview: In Jeju, a spirited girl and a steadfast boy’s island story blossoms into a lifelong tale of setbacks and triumphs — proving love endures across time.
overview_en: In Jeju, a spirited girl and a steadfast boy's island story blossoms into a lifelong tale of setbacks and triumphs — proving love endures across time.

title_khmer: ដេវដេវ៉ល : លេចឡើងម្តងទៀត – Daredevil: Born Again
overview: នៅពេលដែលសត្រូវចាស់ របស់ ដេវដេវ៉ល ក្លាយជាអភិបាលក្រុងញូរយ៉ក ធ្វើឲ្យកើតមានរឿងរ៉ាវ អយុត្តិធម៌ និងចលាចលជាច្រើន, ដេវដេវ៉ល ត្រូវតែលេចឡើងម្ដងទៀតដើម្បីការពារទីក្រុង នឹងប្រឆាំងនឹងរឿងទាំងអស់នោះ
overview_en: Matt Murdock, a blind lawyer with heightened abilities, is fighting for justice through his bustling law firm, while former mob boss Wilson Fisk pursues his own political endeavors in New York. When their past identities begin to emerge, both men find themselves on an inevitable collision course.

title_khmer: ក្រុងខ្មោចកម្លោចស្នេហ៍ – Newtopia
overview: Jae-yoon, a late military enlistee, and his girlfriend, Young-joo, break up over the phone over growing misunderstandings. But a zombie outbreak rocks the world. A national emergency is declared, a plane crashes in the city center, and Jae-yoon and his unit get trapped on top of a Seoul skyscraper. Young-joo risks the zombie-filled streets to find him. Can their love survive the apocalypse?
overview_en: Jae-yoon, a late military enlistee, and his girlfriend, Young-joo, break up over the phone over growing misunderstandings. But a zombie outbreak rocks the world. A national emergency is declared, a plane crashes in the city center, and Jae-yoon and his unit get trapped on top of a Seoul skyscraper. Young-joo risks the zombie-filled streets to find him. Can their love survive the apocalypse?

title_khmer: ប៉ារ៉ាស៊ីតបិសាច – Parasyte: The Grey
overview: When unidentified parasites violently take over human hosts and gain power, humanity must rise to combat the growing threat.
overview_en: When unidentified parasites violently take over human hosts and gain power, humanity must rise to combat the growing threat.

title_khmer: កែវភ្នែកឃើញខ្មោច Mieruko-chan
overview: She can see dead people…she just chooses to ignore them. That’s Miko’s plan, anyway, with horrifying (and sometimes hilarious) results.
overview_en: Jackie Chan teams up with his 11-year-old fictive-niece, Jade, traveling the globe to locate a dozen magical talismans before the sinister Dark Hand. Helping Jackie and Jade is Uncle, a cantankerous but wise antiquities expert.

title_khmer: ហាងអំពូលភ្លើង – Light Shop
overview: In a mysterious shop that sells lamps, the dead may return to the world of the living, while the living may not walk out alive.
overview_en: In a mysterious shop that sells lamps, the dead may return to the world of the living, while the living may not walk out alive.

title_khmer: សម្រស់ពិត True Beauty
overview: Once bullied for her looks, Jugyeong transforms herself using the art of makeup. When she joins a new school with a True Beauty goddess competition, offering winners the chance of recruitment by entertainment agencies, she instantly becomes a top candidate! But her new identity is at stake when heartthrob Suho Lee accidentally sees her bare face. Will her elite status be short-lived?
overview_en: After being bullied and discriminated because of her ugly looks, a high school girl transforms herself into a gorgeous "goddess" and quickly rises to fame after mastering the art of makeup via online tutorial videos.

title_khmer: មន្ដស្នេហ៍កំលោះ Gamer – My Love Story with Yamada-kun at Lv999
title_english: My Love Story with Yamada-kun at Lv999
overview: Recently dumped, Akane is just about to quit the game she used to play with her boyfriend, when she meets Yamada in the same RPG. Yamada in real life turns out to be somewhat of a legend. The only problem is – he is ONLY interested in the game. As Akane’s feelings grow, will Yamada’s focus stay on the game?
overview_en: Recently dumped, Akane is just about to quit the game she used to play with her boyfriend, when she meets Yamada in the same RPG. Yamada in real life turns out to be somewhat of a legend. The only problem is - he is ONLY interested in the game. As Akane's feelings grow, will Yamada's focus stay on the game?

title_khmer: ប្រយុទ្ធដើម្បីប្រាក់ Viral Hit
overview: Scrawny high school student Hobin Yu is probably the last guy you’d expect to star in a NewTube channel that revolves around fighting. But after following some advice from a mysterious NewTube channel, Hobin is soon knocking out guys stronger than him and raking in more money than he could have ever dreamed of. Can Hobin keep this up, or will he eventually meet his match?
overview_en: Scrawny high school student Hobin Yu is probably the last guy you'd expect to star in a NewTube channel that revolves around fighting. But after following some advice from a mysterious NewTube channel, Hobin is soon knocking out guys stronger than him and raking in more money than he could have ever dreamed of. Can Hobin keep this up, or will he eventually meet his match?

title_khmer: ប្តូរកាយ Lookism
overview: In a society that favors good looks, a high school outcast leads a double life switching between his two bodies that are polar opposites in appearance..
overview_en: In a society that favors good looks, a high school outcast leads a double life switching between his two bodies that are polar opposites in appearance.
